detail_text: Tapo C230 Pan/Tilt AI Home Security Wi-Fi Camera • High-Quality Video Recording: Capture every detail with exceptional clarity in 3K 5MP resolution. • Wide Range of Movement: Enjoy a full 360º horizontal and 114º vertical range for pan and tilt, allowing you to cover more area. • Enhanced Night Vision: See clearly even in low-light conditions with advanced night vision that provides visibility up to 40 ft. • Smart AI Detection and Notifications: Benefit from smart AI technology that detects relevant events and sends you instant notifications. • Sound and Light Alarm: Scare away unwanted visitors using a sound and light alarm that triggers attention-grabbing effects. • Two-Way Audio: Enables communication through a built-in microphone and speaker • Safe Storage: Store footage directly on a microSD card with a capacity of up to 512 GB, ensuring safe and convenient storage.(microSD card purchased separately.) • Hands-Free Operation: Control the device using your voice with compatibility for Google Assistant and Amazon Alexa, freeing up your hands for other tasks. (Availability of Google Assistant and Amazon Alexa may vary based on language and country) Tapo C200C Pan/Tilt Home Security Wi-Fi Camera High-Definition Video: The Tapo C200C features 1080p high-definition video, providing users with clear and detailed footage. Night Vision: With advanced night vision up to 40 feet, the Tapo C200C allows users to monitor their homes around the clock. Motion Detection and Alerts: The device uses smart motion detection technology to send instant notifications to your phone whenever movement is detected. Two-Way Audio: The Tapo C200C comes equipped with a built-in microphone and speaker, allowing users to communicate with family, pets, or warn off intruders. Local Storage: The device supports microSD cards up to 512GB for local storage, providing a secure and cost-effective way to store footage. Privacy Mode: Users can enable Privacy Mode to stop recording and control when the camera is monitoring and when it's not. Easy Setup and Management: With the Tapo app, users can easily set up and manage their Tapo C200C, and access live streaming and other controls. Voice Control: The Tapo C200C is compatible with Google Assistant and Amazon Alexa, offering hands-free control for users. Secure Encryption: The device uses advanced encryption and wireless protocols to ensure data privacy and secure communication between your phone and the device. detail_html:
Tapo C230

Pan/Tilt AI Home Security Wi-Fi Camera

• High-Quality Video Recording: Capture every detail with exceptional clarity in 3K 5MP resolution.

• Wide Range of Movement: Enjoy a full 360º horizontal and 114º vertical range for pan and tilt, allowing you to cover more area.

• Enhanced Night Vision: See clearly even in low-light conditions with advanced night vision that provides visibility up to 40 ft.

• Smart AI Detection and Notifications: Benefit from smart AI technology that detects relevant events and sends you instant notifications.

• Sound and Light Alarm: Scare away unwanted visitors using a sound and light alarm that triggers attention-grabbing effects.

• Two-Way Audio: Enables communication through a built-in microphone and speaker

• Safe Storage: Store footage directly on a microSD card with a capacity of up to 512 GB, ensuring safe and convenient storage.(microSD card purchased separately.)

aiTexts: The TP-Link Tapo 360 WIFI 2K QHD AI Home Security IP Camera offers 1080P full HD video with a wide 360° horizontal and 114° vertical viewing angle for comprehensive monitoring.
Features include two-way audio for remote communication, advanced night vision up to 30 feet, motion detection, privacy mode, and audible-visual alarms to enhance security.
Supports local storage up to 128GB via microSD and cloud-based encrypted data storage for privacy protection.
Easy setup with just three steps via the Tapo App, compatible with Hey Google and Alexa.
Ideal for families needing remote monitoring, multi-camera management, and reliable long-term performance with a 3-year local warranty.

items.question: If I turn off wifi for camera, can I still playback from the app?

items.answer: Currently, each camera can be controlled or managed by only one account on the Tapo App. You can share it with 2 different accounts at most and these two accounts can only access live view and playback.

detail_text: HIGHLIGHTS ✅Two-way video: camera with a 2.8-inch screen, can actively call the phone, to achieve two-way video, two-way voice. Install "ICSEE" APP,Android: Please search"ICSEE"at the Google play;Apple: Please search "ICSEE"at the Apple App store. ✅Active call: the camera can actively call the cell phone, the elderly or children with urgent matters can press the camera's phone button active call. ✅1080P Full HD & Smart Pan/Tilt Indoor Camera: 1920*1080 Mega Pixels Support reliable Ethernet cable and 2.4GHz Wi-Fi connectivity (Not compatible with 5GHz), with horizontal 360° and vertical 110° function for complete coverage of your home, no blind spot. ✅Motion Activated, Wide Angle and Night Vision - With motion activated sensor, 360° wide view angle and crystal clear night vision, the camera let you monitor all your blind spots, make sure no movement goes unnoticed and see clearly in the dark - lets you detect what’s happening around the clock. ✅Cell phone App available on iPhone and Android - Customize your camera settings according to your preferences,sharing the pet/puppy/nanny cam with up to 5 family members or friends , customize motion detection and alarm schedule, sensitivity, infrared night vision and more.
detail_html:
HIGHLIGHTS

✅Two-way video: camera with a 2.8-inch screen, can actively call the phone, to achieve two-way video, two-way voice. Install "ICSEE" APP,Android: Please search"ICSEE"at the Google play;Apple: Please search "ICSEE"at the Apple App store.

✅Active call: the camera can actively call the cell phone, the elderly or children with urgent matters can press the camera's phone button active call.

✅1080P Full HD & Smart Pan/Tilt Indoor Camera: 1920*1080 Mega Pixels Support reliable Ethernet cable and 2.4GHz Wi-Fi connectivity (Not compatible with 5GHz), with horizontal 360° and vertical 110° function for complete coverage of your home, no blind spot.

✅Motion Activated, Wide Angle and Night Vision - With motion activated sensor, 360° wide view angle and crystal clear night vision, the camera let you monitor all your blind spots, make sure no movement goes unnoticed and see clearly in the dark - lets you detect what’s happening around the clock.

✅Cell phone App available on iPhone and Android - Customize your camera settings according to your preferences,sharing the pet/puppy/nanny cam with up to 5 family members or friends , customize motion detection and alarm schedule, sensitivity, infrared night vision and more.

aiTexts: The LLSEE Smart CCTV Camera is an essential security solution for any home or business.
With its 1080P resolution and 360° rotation, it ensures comprehensive coverage and crystal-clear video quality.
The built-in 2.8-inch IPS screen allows for easy monitoring, while two-way audio enables seamless communication.
Compatible with a 128G TF card, it offers ample storage for recorded footage.
Ideal for outdoor use, this camera combines durability with advanced features to enhance your security system.

title: LLSEE HD 1080P Home Video Call Mini Security Camera CCTV Camera Home Wireless WIFI Infrared Night Vision Mobile Tracking
detail_text: 1080P Home Video Call Camera: Just click to initiate a video call, and the video will automatically connect. Family members do not require any action. Built in microphone and speaker/new custom speaker for high volume. You can talk to people near the camera. PTZ remote control It can rotate horizontally by 355 ° and vertically by 90 °. Motion detection and automatic tracking After locking the target, the camera will automatically adjust the pan tilt rotation. Track moving objects, cars, pets, humans, and push alert notifications to your smartphone. Clear night vision Provide clear night vision, distance means you won't miss any sports, you can see clearly in the dark Provide good picture in Light-on-dark color scheme Wi Fi and Bluetooth connectivity The camera only supports 2.4hz (4G) WIFI. If your home network has both 4G and 5G WIFI, you need to separate the networks so that the camera is only connected to the home 4G WIFI. The name cannot have symbols or spaces You can connect your camera to a Wi Fi network or use Bluetooth connection. SD card and Cloud storage The storage card slot is under the lens, and you can flip the lens up to see it It supports up to 128G registration of Cloud storage and SD card, making data more secure and stable. If you want to continue using cloud services, you only need to pay a fee. If you don't need to use it, it will automatically stop when you don't pay the fee. P2P/Multi User Remote Access Share the same camera with your family, leave everything you protect, and pay more attention to your home. P2P technology allows you to view real-time events at home no matter where you are.
detail_html:
1080P Home Video Call Camera: Just click to initiate a video call, and the video will automatically connect. Family members do not require any action.

Built in microphone and speaker/new custom speaker for high volume.

You can talk to people near the camera.

PTZ remote control

It can rotate horizontally by 355 ° and vertically by 90 °.

Motion detection and automatic tracking

After locking the target, the camera will automatically adjust the pan tilt rotation. Track moving objects, cars, pets, humans, and push alert notifications to your smartphone.

Clear night vision

Provide clear night vision, distance means you won't miss any sports, you can see clearly in the dark

Provide good picture in Light-on-dark color scheme

Wi Fi and Bluetooth connectivity

The camera only supports 2.4hz (4G) WIFI. If your home network has both 4G and 5G WIFI, you need to separate the networks so that the camera is only connected to the home 4G WIFI. The name cannot have symbols or spaces

You can connect your camera to a Wi Fi network or use Bluetooth connection.

SD card and Cloud storage

The storage card slot is under the lens, and you can flip the lens up to see it

It supports up to 128G registration of Cloud storage and SD card, making data more secure and stable.

If you want to continue using cloud services, you only need to pay a fee. If you don't need to use it, it will automatically stop when you don't pay the fee.

P2P/Multi User Remote Access

Share the same camera with your family, leave everything you protect, and pay more attention to your home.

P2P technology allows you to view real-time events at home no matter where you are.

detail_html:
Spend $100 or more in our store and receive a FREE Portable Neck Fan (worth $12.90) while stocks last!

✅ 2k 3MP Clear Vision (2304 × 1296)

Sharper and clearer than standard 1080P cameras

✅ 360° Full Room Coverage

Wide-angle monitoring with flexible viewing

✅ AI Motion Tracking

Automatically detects and follows movement

✅ Clear Night Vision

See clearly even in low-light environments

✅ Two-Way Audio

Talk and listen in real time through the app

✅ Real-Time Motion Alerts

Instant notification sent to your smartphone

✅ Dual Storage Support

Supports Micro SD Card up to 512GB + Cloud Storage

✅ Multi-Device Access

View on Mobile, Tablet & PC, up to 16 cameras on the same screen

✅ Multi-User Sharing

Share camera access with family members

✅ Works With Alexa & Google Assistant

✅ Easy Installation

Desktop / Wall Mount / Ceiling Mount

✅ Comes with 2m Long USB-C Cable + UK USB Power Adapter(With Safety Mark)

✅ 18 Months Singapore Local Warranty

Product Specifications

Model: GXM P3

Resolution: 3MP

Video Resolution: 2304 × 1296

Connectivity: 2.4GHz Wi-Fi

Rotation: 360° Pan

Night Vision: Yes

Motion Detection: AI Motion Tracking

Audio: Two-Way Audio

Storage: Micro SD Card up to 512GB

Cloud Storage: Supported

App Support: GXM App

Device Support: iOS & Android

Voice Assistant: Alexa & Google Assistant

Power Input: DC 5V ⎓ 1A

Charging Port: USB-C

Installation: Desktop / Wall / Ceiling

Product Size: 120 × 68 × 66 mm

Weight: 185g

Optional Memory Card Add-on:

SanDisk Ultra® microSDXC™ UHS-I Card( 7-Year SanDisk Singapore Warranty)

32GB - Approx 7 Days Recording

64GB - Approx 14 Days Recording

128GB - Approx 30 Days Recording

What’s In The Box

* GXM P3 Camera ×1

* 2m USB-C Cable ×1

* UK USB Power Adapter(With Safety Mark) ×1

* Mounting Base ×1

* Screw Pack ×1

* User Manual ×1

brand.name: GXM
brand.suggestion: More Surveillance Cameras & Systems from GXM

product.desc:
Spend $100 or more in our store and receive a FREE Portable Neck Fan (worth $12.90) while stocks last!

✅ 2k 3MP Clear Vision (2304 × 1296)

Sharper and clearer than standard 1080P cameras

✅ 360° Full Room Coverage

Wide-angle monitoring with flexible viewing

✅ AI Motion Tracking

Automatically detects and follows movement

✅ Clear Night Vision

See clearly even in low-light environments

✅ Two-Way Audio

Talk and listen in real time through the app

✅ Real-Time Motion Alerts

Instant notification sent to your smartphone

✅ Dual Storage Support

Supports Micro SD Card up to 512GB + Cloud Storage

✅ Multi-Device Access

View on Mobile, Tablet & PC, up to 16 cameras on the same screen

✅ Multi-User Sharing

Share camera access with family members

✅ Works With Alexa & Google Assistant

✅ Easy Installation

Desktop / Wall Mount / Ceiling Mount

✅ Comes with 2m Long USB-C Cable + UK USB Power Adapter(With Safety Mark)

✅ 18 Months Singapore Local Warranty

Product Specifications

Model: GXM P3

Resolution: 3MP

Video Resolution: 2304 × 1296

Connectivity: 2.4GHz Wi-Fi

Rotation: 360° Pan

Night Vision: Yes

Motion Detection: AI Motion Tracking

Audio: Two-Way Audio

Storage: Micro SD Card up to 512GB

Cloud Storage: Supported

App Support: GXM App

Device Support: iOS & Android

Voice Assistant: Alexa & Google Assistant

Power Input: DC 5V ⎓ 1A

Charging Port: USB-C

Installation: Desktop / Wall / Ceiling

Product Size: 120 × 68 × 66 mm

Weight: 185g

Optional Memory Card Add-on:

SanDisk Ultra® microSDXC™ UHS-I Card( 7-Year SanDisk Singapore Warranty)

32GB - Approx 7 Days Recording

64GB - Approx 14 Days Recording

128GB - Approx 30 Days Recording

What’s In The Box

* GXM P3 Camera ×1

* 2m USB-C Cable ×1

* UK USB Power Adapter(With Safety Mark) ×1

* Mounting Base ×1

* Screw Pack ×1

* User Manual ×1

title: V380 Solar 4G IP Camera Outdoor 12MP 6K Triple Lenses Triple Screens Security Video Monitor Night Vision Waterproof CCTV Cameras
detail_text: Why Choose This Camera? This monitor is a three lens camera,support three screens monitoring, about left lens and right len are the fixed position cameras, only support to adjust its angle up to 180° by hand, the below one is PT camera, support 10x digital zoom, can enlarge image bigger. NOTE: **Please fully charge the camera (about 5-6 hours) before you use it for the first time. **Upper lenses are manually adjustable only，The main lens supports mobile PTZ control. Specifications: *Triple lens,triple screens design lets you see more detail; * 12MP 6K resolution, each lens is 4MP, 12MP=4MP+4MP+4MP HD images bring you a higher definition visual experience; *Built-in IR LEDs and white LEDs provide you with clear, colorful day and night images; *Support night vision, 3 image modes: Auto Mode/Full Color Mode/B&W Mode; *Support 4GSIM network connection; *The upper left and right is fixed position lens, 180 degrees; vertical: 360 degrees; The bottom is PT lens, horizontal: 320 degrees; vertical: 90 degrees; *Support local storage and cloud storage (need to pay in V380 Pro APP); *Two way voice intercom, bi-directional video synchronized recording and playback; *Smart Alerts for People Detection: Motion-triggered alerts, APP push notifications and alert recording; *Automatic tracking: automatically follow the object when the video camera detects its movement; *Smartphone app name: "V380 Pro" , download from Google Play Store or iOS App Store; Note: 4G version camera does not work in these countries (Chile, Japan, USA, Canada, Colombia, Peru ) 4G camera only support 4G sim card connection, built in SD card slot and SIM Card slot . Three lens, three screen camera with no blind spots for monitoring The upper two fixed lenses provide 180° wide-angle panoramic surveillance images, The following PTZ lens supports horizontal 320° rotation, vertical 90° rotation, three lenses can provide you with 360 no dead angle monitoring. PTZ Control The upper left camera and upper right camera can be adjusted (horizontal 0°-180°) and (vertical 0°-360°) by hands directly , monitor any corner you want. The bottom PT camera support horizontal 320° and the vertical 90°, you can remotely control the camera to view every corner via your mobile phone. Solar Energy & No need to charge,Built in 8000mAh battery for long-lasting use. Connect the camera to the solar panel,and it will get uninterrupted power all day and all night.You can easily place weather resistant solar panels to maximize exposure to sunlight. Solar Charing Built In Battery and USB cable Charging 1.The camera can be detached with a large capacity battery, And solar panel is converted into energy by absorption and heat absorption to power the battery without connecting, the power supply easy to navigate. 2.Support to use DC 5V adapter to recharge power via usb cable lines. Motion Detection Alert & Human Detect Alert When detecting someone within range, the camera will sound an alarm and push the message to your smartphone via V380 Pro app. Support Two Way Audio Built in microphone and speaker,support real time video,which allows you talk with your visitor in real time wherever you are. PIR Human Detection The video surveillance camera would enter sleep mode, if no motion or no human activity, to save energy. Once hunman enter the motion area, the CCTV camera would quickly wake up and send notification alerts. Color Night Vision -Immersive 12MP Super HD & Starlight Night Vision Equipped with 11pcs IR-Cut led lights, up to 30 meters night vision distance, so that you can get high quality video even at night. The smart IR-Cut filter switches automatically between day and night. Three Working Modes Available 1. Lower power mode -- suggest choosing 2. Battery saving mode 3. Adaptive power mode IP66 Waterproof The rugged housing and body make IP camera waterproof. It works perfectly both inside and outside your house, in any harsh weather conditions. Preset Position Settings You can set 6 preset positions,click to return to the set position. Usage Scenarios Can be used a variety of environments.Different installation methods.Suitable for various scenarios. Support Multiple Users Multiple Users Access 1.Camera support Multiple users view, you can through APP share camera to your friend,family,and so on. 2.Support Many users watch a camera at the same time. 3.Support all Android/IOS phone/tablets. Dual-storage design Support MAX 128GB SD/TF Card and cloud storage monitoring data is sent to the cloud. FAQ Q: How much W is the solar panel? Can rechargeable batteries be used? A: 8W, yes,can work with battery charging. Q：Why choose our camera？ A : SAVE MONEY. The camera has 3 lens & 3 screen =2x Bullet Cameras+1x PTZ Camera. Q: What is the operating temperature range? A: Usually the working temperature is -10~55℃, it can work well in winter because the temperature will increase when the camera is running. Q: How much W is the solar panel? Can rechargeable batteries be used? A: 8W, yes,can work with battery charging" Q: If the home is powered off, can the camera still operate normally? A: Yes, because your camera uses battery to work." Q: What is the total length of the cable from the camera to the outlet? A: The solar panel cable is about 1.8 meter." Can this camera use in the USA? Sorry, 4G camera cannot use in the USA, Korea, Chile,Japan, Mexico,Canada,Colombia, Peru and other American countries. If you need, please buy the wifi camera, thank you! What should i do when i get the solar camera? Open the power on button, charge the battery camera about 8-10 hours. How to open the alarm notification? Open your V380 pro app,choose "profile", then find out the settings--Alarm Message-- Turn on the APP Push. So, you can get the alarm notification on your phone. If you have any questions about the device. You can find out more answer in the "FAQ" in the setting of V380 pro app.
detail_html:
Why Choose This Camera?

This monitor is a three lens camera,support three screens monitoring, about left lens and right len are the fixed position cameras, only support to adjust its angle up to 180° by hand, the below one is PT camera, support 10x digital zoom, can enlarge image bigger.


NOTE:

**Please fully charge the camera (about 5-6 hours) before you use it for the first time.

**Upper lenses are manually adjustable only，The main lens supports mobile PTZ control.


Specifications:


*Triple lens,triple screens design lets you see more detail;


*12MP 6K resolution, each lens is 4MP, 12MP=4MP+4MP+4MP

  HD images bring you a higher definition visual experience;


*Built-in IR LEDs and white LEDs provide you with clear, colorful day and night images;


*Support night vision, 3 image modes: Auto Mode/Full Color Mode/B&W Mode;


*Support 4GSIM network connection;


*The upper left and right is fixed position lens, 180 degrees; vertical: 360 degrees;

The bottom is PT lens, horizontal: 320 degrees; vertical: 90 degrees;


*Support local storage and cloud storage (need to pay in V380 Pro APP);


*Two way voice intercom, bi-directional video synchronized recording and playback;


*Smart Alerts for People Detection: Motion-triggered alerts, APP push notifications and alert recording;


*Automatic tracking: automatically follow the object when the video camera detects its movement;


*Smartphone app name: "V380 Pro", download from Google Play Store or iOS App Store;


Note: 

4G version camera does not work in these countries (Chile, Japan, USA, Canada, Colombia, Peru )

4G camera only support 4G sim card connection, built in SD card slot and SIM Card slot.


Three lens, three screen camera with no blind spots for monitoring

The upper two fixed lenses provide 180° wide-angle panoramic surveillance images,

The following PTZ lens supports horizontal 320° rotation, vertical 90° rotation, three lenses can provide you with 360 no dead angle monitoring.

PTZ Control

The upper left camera and upper right camera can be adjusted (horizontal 0°-180°) and (vertical 0°-360°) by hands directly, monitor any corner you want.

The bottom PT camera support horizontal 320° and the vertical 90°, you can remotely control the camera to view every corner via your mobile phone.


Solar Energy & No need to charge,Built in 8000mAh battery for long-lasting use.

Connect the camera to the solar panel,and it will get uninterrupted power all day and all night.You can easily place weather resistant solar panels to maximize exposure to sunlight.

Solar Charing Built In Battery and USB cable Charging


1.The camera can be detached with a large capacity battery, And solar panel is converted into energy by absorption and heat absorption to power the battery without connecting, the power supply easy to navigate.

2.Support to use DC 5V adapter to recharge power via usb cable lines.

Motion Detection Alert & Human Detect Alert

When detecting someone within range, the camera will sound an alarm and push the message to your smartphone via V380 Pro app.



Support Two Way Audio

Built in microphone and speaker,support real time video,which allows you talk with your visitor in real time wherever you are.


PIR Human Detection

The video surveillance camera would enter sleep mode, if no motion or no human activity, to save energy.

Once hunman enter the motion area, the CCTV camera would quickly wake up and send notification alerts.


Color Night Vision -Immersive 12MP Super HD & Starlight Night Vision

Equipped with 11pcs IR-Cut led lights, up to 30 meters night vision distance, so that you can get high quality video even at night.

The smart IR-Cut filter switches automatically between day and night.


Three Working Modes Available

1. Lower power mode -- suggest choosing

2. Battery saving mode

3. Adaptive power mode

IP66 Waterproof

The rugged housing and body make IP camera waterproof. It works perfectly both inside and outside your house, in any harsh weather conditions.

Preset Position Settings

You can set 6 preset positions,click to return to the set position.

Usage Scenarios

Can be used a variety of environments.Different installation methods.Suitable for various scenarios.

Support Multiple Users



Multiple Users Access

1.Camera support Multiple users view, you can through APP share camera to your friend,family,and so on.

2.Support Many users watch a camera at the same time.

3.Support all Android/IOS phone/tablets.

Dual-storage design

Support MAX 128GB SD/TF Card and cloud storage monitoring data is sent to the cloud.


FAQ

Q: How much W is the solar panel? Can rechargeable batteries be used?

A: 8W, yes,can work with battery charging.


Q：Why choose our camera？

A : SAVE MONEY. The camera has 3 lens & 3 screen =2x Bullet Cameras+1x PTZ Camera.


Q: What is the operating temperature range?

A: Usually the working temperature is -10~55℃, it can work well in winter because the temperature will increase when the camera is running.


Q: How much W is the solar panel? Can rechargeable batteries be used?

A: 8W, yes,can work with battery charging"


Q: If the home is powered off, can the camera still operate normally?

A: Yes, because your camera uses battery to work."


Q: What is the total length of the cable from the camera to the outlet?

A: The solar panel cable is about 1.8 meter."


Can this camera use in the USA?

Sorry, 4G camera cannot use in the USA, Korea, Chile,Japan, Mexico,Canada,Colombia, Peru and other American countries.

If you need, please buy the wifi camera, thank you!


What should i do when i get the solar camera?

Open the power on button, charge the battery camera about 8-10 hours.


How to open the alarm notification?

Open your V380 pro app,choose "profile", then find out the settings--Alarm Message-- Turn on the APP Push.

So, you can get the alarm notification on your phone.

If you have any questions about the device. You can find out more answer in the "FAQ" in the setting of V380 pro app.

brand.name: V380
brand.suggestion: More Surveillance Cameras & Systems from V380

product.desc:
Why Choose This Camera?

This monitor is a three lens camera,support three screens monitoring, about left lens and right len are the fixed position cameras, only support to adjust its angle up to 180° by hand, the below one is PT camera, support 10x digital zoom, can enlarge image bigger.


NOTE:

**Please fully charge the camera (about 5-6 hours) before you use it for the first time.

**Upper lenses are manually adjustable only，The main lens supports mobile PTZ control.


Specifications:


*Triple lens,triple screens design lets you see more detail;


*12MP 6K resolution, each lens is 4MP, 12MP=4MP+4MP+4MP

  HD images bring you a higher definition visual experience;


*Built-in IR LEDs and white LEDs provide you with clear, colorful day and night images;


*Support night vision, 3 image modes: Auto Mode/Full Color Mode/B&W Mode;


*Support 4GSIM network connection;


*The upper left and right is fixed position lens, 180 degrees; vertical: 360 degrees;

The bottom is PT lens, horizontal: 320 degrees; vertical: 90 degrees;


*Support local storage and cloud storage (need to pay in V380 Pro APP);


*Two way voice intercom, bi-directional video synchronized recording and playback;


*Smart Alerts for People Detection: Motion-triggered alerts, APP push notifications and alert recording;


*Automatic tracking: automatically follow the object when the video camera detects its movement;


*Smartphone app name: "V380 Pro", download from Google Play Store or iOS App Store;


Note: 

4G version camera does not work in these countries (Chile, Japan, USA, Canada, Colombia, Peru )

4G camera only support 4G sim card connection, built in SD card slot and SIM Card slot.


Three lens, three screen camera with no blind spots for monitoring

The upper two fixed lenses provide 180° wide-angle panoramic surveillance images,

The following PTZ lens supports horizontal 320° rotation, vertical 90° rotation, three lenses can provide you with 360 no dead angle monitoring.

PTZ Control

The upper left camera and upper right camera can be adjusted (horizontal 0°-180°) and (vertical 0°-360°) by hands directly, monitor any corner you want.

The bottom PT camera support horizontal 320° and the vertical 90°, you can remotely control the camera to view every corner via your mobile phone.


Solar Energy & No need to charge,Built in 8000mAh battery for long-lasting use.

Connect the camera to the solar panel,and it will get uninterrupted power all day and all night.You can easily place weather resistant solar panels to maximize exposure to sunlight.

Solar Charing Built In Battery and USB cable Charging


1.The camera can be detached with a large capacity battery, And solar panel is converted into energy by absorption and heat absorption to power the battery without connecting, the power supply easy to navigate.

2.Support to use DC 5V adapter to recharge power via usb cable lines.

Motion Detection Alert & Human Detect Alert

When detecting someone within range, the camera will sound an alarm and push the message to your smartphone via V380 Pro app.



Support Two Way Audio

Built in microphone and speaker,support real time video,which allows you talk with your visitor in real time wherever you are.


PIR Human Detection

The video surveillance camera would enter sleep mode, if no motion or no human activity, to save energy.

Once hunman enter the motion area, the CCTV camera would quickly wake up and send notification alerts.


Color Night Vision -Immersive 12MP Super HD & Starlight Night Vision

Equipped with 11pcs IR-Cut led lights, up to 30 meters night vision distance, so that you can get high quality video even at night.

The smart IR-Cut filter switches automatically between day and night.


Three Working Modes Available

1. Lower power mode -- suggest choosing

2. Battery saving mode

3. Adaptive power mode

IP66 Waterproof

The rugged housing and body make IP camera waterproof. It works perfectly both inside and outside your house, in any harsh weather conditions.

Preset Position Settings

You can set 6 preset positions,click to return to the set position.

Usage Scenarios

Can be used a variety of environments.Different installation methods.Suitable for various scenarios.

Support Multiple Users



Multiple Users Access

1.Camera support Multiple users view, you can through APP share camera to your friend,family,and so on.

2.Support Many users watch a camera at the same time.

3.Support all Android/IOS phone/tablets.

Dual-storage design

Support MAX 128GB SD/TF Card and cloud storage monitoring data is sent to the cloud.


FAQ

Q: How much W is the solar panel? Can rechargeable batteries be used?

A: 8W, yes,can work with battery charging.


Q：Why choose our camera？

A : SAVE MONEY. The camera has 3 lens & 3 screen =2x Bullet Cameras+1x PTZ Camera.


Q: What is the operating temperature range?

A: Usually the working temperature is -10~55℃, it can work well in winter because the temperature will increase when the camera is running.


Q: How much W is the solar panel? Can rechargeable batteries be used?

A: 8W, yes,can work with battery charging"


Q: If the home is powered off, can the camera still operate normally?

A: Yes, because your camera uses battery to work."


Q: What is the total length of the cable from the camera to the outlet?

A: The solar panel cable is about 1.8 meter."


Can this camera use in the USA?

Sorry, 4G camera cannot use in the USA, Korea, Chile,Japan, Mexico,Canada,Colombia, Peru and other American countries.

If you need, please buy the wifi camera, thank you!


What should i do when i get the solar camera?

Open the power on button, charge the battery camera about 8-10 hours.


How to open the alarm notification?

Open your V380 pro app,choose "profile", then find out the settings--Alarm Message-- Turn on the APP Push.

So, you can get the alarm notification on your phone.

If you have any questions about the device. You can find out more answer in the "FAQ" in the setting of V380 pro app.

detail_text: Feature： 【Dual Camera & 3MP Super HD】 This indoor security camera has two cameras to check two different areas at the same time. 3MP HD dual lens camera with a CMOS image sensor and a resolution of up to 2304*1296 at 12 frames per second, provides sharper images and video 【Motion Detection & Real-Time Alerts 】Smart indoor cameras for home security automatically track and record, sending real-time alerts to your mobile phone when human movement or sound is detected, so you won't miss a moment. Please note that this home surveillance camera only supports 2.4GHz WiFi 【Two-Way Audio & Multiple Sharing】This home dual camera has a built-in microphone and speaker to provide stable communication, You can communicate and interact with family and friends in front of the camera. You can also share it with your family and friends, multiple people can watch the surveillance video at the same time and enjoy the common fun 【Color Night Vision & Pan Tilt Zoom】This pet monitor camera comes with 12 red lights and 4 white lights with full colour night vision, even at night, you can see the high-definition color picture. Up to 360° of pan view and 90° of tilt view allows the indoor camera to cover an extra wide area of your home or bedroom 【Cloud & TF Card Storage】The dual-lens wifi camera provides secure and convenient cloud storage(30-day free trial for new user), or you can save videos via TF card (not included) with a maximum capacity of 128G. The dual lens wifi camera is widely used for home, pet, cat, dog, baby ﻿ Details: 1. Application: icsee (supporting Android and IOS) 2.Image sensor: CMOS sensors 3. Angle of view: rotation 360 ° 4. Light control mode: Starlight Full Color/Intelligent Warning/Infrared Night Vision 5. Pan head control: horizontal rotation angle: 355 °; Vertical: 90 ° 6. Recording method: manual recording, dynamic detection recording, timing recording, and alarm recording 7. Storage: Cloud storage+TF local video (up to 128GB) 8. Support for human shape tracking 9. Wireless network: 2.4G WIFI 802.11b/g/n 10. Distribution network: WiFi Smartlink distribution network addition, AP hotspot addition, QR code scanning 11: Network protocol: TCP/IP, ONVIF, RTSP 12 Applicable places: homes, shops, supermarkets, factories, and other places; ﻿ Packing List： 1x 2MP smart cloud camera 1xSpecification 1xScrew pack 1xstents
detail_html:
Feature：

【Dual Camera & 3MP Super HD】 This indoor security camera has two cameras to check two different areas at the same time. 3MP HD dual lens camera with a CMOS image sensor and a resolution of up to 2304*1296 at 12 frames per second, provides sharper images and video

【Motion Detection & Real-Time Alerts 】Smart indoor cameras for home security automatically track and record, sending real-time alerts to your mobile phone when human movement or sound is detected, so you won't miss a moment. Please note that this home surveillance camera only supports 2.4GHz WiFi

【Two-Way Audio & Multiple Sharing】This home dual camera has a built-in microphone and speaker to provide stable communication, You can communicate and interact with family and friends in front of the camera. You can also share it with your family and friends, multiple people can watch the surveillance video at the same time and enjoy the common fun

【Color Night Vision & Pan Tilt Zoom】This pet monitor camera comes with 12 red lights and 4 white lights with full colour night vision, even at night, you can see the high-definition color picture. Up to 360° of pan view and 90° of tilt view allows the indoor camera to cover an extra wide area of your home or bedroom

【Cloud & TF Card Storage】The dual-lens wifi camera provides secure and convenient cloud storage(30-day free trial for new user), or you can save videos via TF card (not included) with a maximum capacity of 128G. The dual lens wifi camera is widely used for home, pet, cat, dog, baby

﻿

Details:

1. Application: icsee (supporting Android and IOS)

2.Image sensor: CMOS sensors

3. Angle of view: rotation 360 °

4. Light control mode: Starlight Full Color/Intelligent Warning/Infrared Night Vision

5. Pan head control: horizontal rotation angle: 355 °; Vertical: 90 °

6. Recording method: manual recording, dynamic detection recording, timing recording, and alarm recording

7. Storage: Cloud storage+TF local video (up to 128GB)

8. Support for human shape tracking

9. Wireless network: 2.4G WIFI 802.11b/g/n

10. Distribution network: WiFi Smartlink distribution network addition, AP hotspot addition, QR code scanning

11: Network protocol: TCP/IP, ONVIF, RTSP

12 Applicable places: homes, shops, supermarkets, factories, and other places;

﻿

Packing List：

1x 2MP smart cloud camera

1xSpecification

1xScrew pack

1xstents

product.desc:
Feature：

【Dual Camera & 3MP Super HD】 This indoor security camera has two cameras to check two different areas at the same time. 3MP HD dual lens camera with a CMOS image sensor and a resolution of up to 2304*1296 at 12 frames per second, provides sharper images and video

【Motion Detection & Real-Time Alerts 】Smart indoor cameras for home security automatically track and record, sending real-time alerts to your mobile phone when human movement or sound is detected, so you won't miss a moment. Please note that this home surveillance camera only supports 2.4GHz WiFi

【Two-Way Audio & Multiple Sharing】This home dual camera has a built-in microphone and speaker to provide stable communication, You can communicate and interact with family and friends in front of the camera. You can also share it with your family and friends, multiple people can watch the surveillance video at the same time and enjoy the common fun

【Color Night Vision & Pan Tilt Zoom】This pet monitor camera comes with 12 red lights and 4 white lights with full colour night vision, even at night, you can see the high-definition color picture. Up to 360° of pan view and 90° of tilt view allows the indoor camera to cover an extra wide area of your home or bedroom

【Cloud & TF Card Storage】The dual-lens wifi camera provides secure and convenient cloud storage(30-day free trial for new user), or you can save videos via TF card (not included) with a maximum capacity of 128G. The dual lens wifi camera is widely used for home, pet, cat, dog, baby

﻿

Details:

1. Application: icsee (supporting Android and IOS)

2.Image sensor: CMOS sensors

3. Angle of view: rotation 360 °

4. Light control mode: Starlight Full Color/Intelligent Warning/Infrared Night Vision

5. Pan head control: horizontal rotation angle: 355 °; Vertical: 90 °

6. Recording method: manual recording, dynamic detection recording, timing recording, and alarm recording

7. Storage: Cloud storage+TF local video (up to 128GB)

8. Support for human shape tracking

9. Wireless network: 2.4G WIFI 802.11b/g/n

10. Distribution network: WiFi Smartlink distribution network addition, AP hotspot addition, QR code scanning

11: Network protocol: TCP/IP, ONVIF, RTSP

12 Applicable places: homes, shops, supermarkets, factories, and other places;

﻿

Packing List：

1x 2MP smart cloud camera

1xSpecification

1xScrew pack

1xstents

product.desc:
LOCAL SELLER, READY STOCK // SHIPPING FROM SG

FAST DELIVERY // WITHIN 1-3 WORKING DAYS

FREE 3 YEARS LOCAL WARRANTY

KEY FEATURES (Both Models)

✅ 2K + 2K Dual Lens (3MP + 3MP) — Monitor two separate areas at once with dual high-definition optics.

✅ Wide-Angle + Telephoto Lens — Fixed wide-angle lens for full-area awareness paired with a 6mm telephoto pan/tilt lens delivering 3× clarity for down-to-the-detail protection.

✅ Synchronized Smart Tracking — When the fixed lens detects motion, the pan/tilt lens automatically pivots to follow the subject.

✅ One-Tap Smart Focus — Tap any spot on the wide-angle view in the Tapo app, and the telephoto lens instantly centres and zooms in.

✅ Free AI Detection (No Subscription!) — Smart alerts for Person / Pet / Vehicle / Baby Cry detection, straight to your phone.

✅ 360° Patrol Mode + 8 Preset Points — Set patrol routes, define up to 8 preset viewing positions, and schedule monitoring by time of day.

✅ Advanced Night Vision — Crisp black-and-white IR vision up to 40ft for clear footage even in pitch dark.

✅ 2-Way Audio — Built-in premium mic and speakers for real-time, crystal-clear conversations.

✅ Secure Storage — Local storage via microSD card up to 512GB (sold separately) OR Tapo Care cloud storage with 30-day video history.

✅ Smart Home Integration — Works with Amazon Alexa, Google Assistant & Samsung SmartThings. View live feeds on Echo Show or Chromecast.

✅ Privacy Zones & Activity Zones — Block sensitive areas from recording and customise detection zones for more relevant alerts.

✅ Advanced Cybersecurity — 128-bit AES encryption with SSL/TLS for protected footage and secure remote access.

WHAT'S IN THE BOX

1 x Tapo C245D Camera

️ Hassle-Free Returns — Easy return for defective or incorrect

page_json.name: [TAPO OFFICIAL] C245D/C246D/TC34 Dual-Lens Pan/Tilt 2K+2K WiFi AI Home Security Camera | Smart Tracking | IP CCTV
page_json.description: LOCAL SELLER, READY STOCK // SHIPPING FROM SGFAST DELIVERY // WITHIN 1-3 WORKING DAYSFREE 3 YEARS LOCAL WARRANTY   KEY FEATURES (Both Models)✅ 2K + 2K Dual Lens (3MP + 3MP) — Monitor two separate areas at once with dual high-definition optics.✅ Wide-Angle + Telephoto Lens — Fixed wide-angle lens for full-area awareness paired with a 6mm telephoto pan/tilt lens delivering 3× clarity for down-to-the-detail protection.✅ Synchronized Smart Tracking — When the fixed lens detects motion, the pan/tilt lens automatically pivots to follow the subject.✅ One-Tap Smart Focus — Tap any spot on the wide-angle view in the Tapo app, and the telephoto lens instantly centres and zooms in.✅ Free AI Detection (No Subscription!) — Smart alerts for Person / Pet / Vehicle / Baby Cry detection, straight to your phone.✅ 360° Patrol Mode + 8 Preset Points — Set patrol routes, define up to 8 preset viewing positions, and schedule monitoring by time of day.✅ Advanced Night Vision — Crisp black-and-white IR vision up to 40ft for clear footage even in pitch dark.✅ 2-Way Audio — Built-in premium mic and speakers for real-time, crystal-clear conversations.✅ Secure Storage — Local storage via microSD card up to 512GB (sold separately) OR Tapo Care cloud storage with 30-day video history.✅ Smart Home Integration — Works with Amazon Alexa, Google Assistant & Samsung SmartThings. View live feeds on Echo Show or Chromecast.✅ Privacy Zones & Activity Zones — Block sensitive areas from recording and customise detection zones for more relevant alerts.✅ Advanced Cybersecurity — 128-bit AES encryption with SSL/TLS for protected footage and secure remote access. WHAT'S IN THE BOX Tapo C245D: 1 x Tapo C245D Camera1 x DC Power Adapter1 x Mounting Template1 x Mounting Bracket4 x  Screws & Anchors1 x Quick Start Guide Tapo C246D: 1 x Tapo C246D Camera1 x Mounting Bracket1 x Mounting Template Sticker4 x Mounting Anchors4 x Mounting Screws1 x Power Adapter1 x 3m USB Adapter Cable1 x Quick Start Guide ---- WHY BUY FROM US? ----️ Authenticity Guaranteed — 100% genuine TP-Link product.️ Warranty Coverage — 1-year local warranty in Singapore.️ Hassle-Free Returns — Easy return for defective or incorrect

title: Wifi Wireless Security CCTV Camera 5MP Indoor Mini video Surveillance Camera Motion Detection Smart Life Baby Monitor Tuya Smart
detail_text: Tuya Smart 5MP Indoor Mini Surveillance Camera Wifi Wireless Cube Security CCTV Cameras Motion Detection Smart Home Baby Monitor ●Support 2.4Ghz WiFi ●5MP HD pixels ●Two-way Audio ●Human/Motion Detection ●Draw monitoring area and sound alarm ●Local storage(tf card) and Cloud storage(not free) ●Real-time viewing by multiple users ●Infrared/Color Night Vision ●Supports PC and mobile app remote control ●App: tuya smart ●Shipping time: Within 24 hours on working days. ●Warranty: 3-years Follow us to get more offers and send free benefits to followers regularly. Two Way Audio Camera is built with microphone and speaker. So you can talk to your kids via your Smartphone remotely whenever you want. MINI camera is easy to carry The size of the main body of the camera is: 52*60*33mm, compact and easy to carry HD 5MP High Definition Display High-Definition interface output,Suport for online playback,Mobile remote,Multi-window display with 5MP Resolution.The angle will be more larger,and the image will be more clearer. Motion Detection & Email Alert & Alarm Sound Effectively filter invalid alarms and make the alarms more accurate, it only detects the human movement. When the camera detects the human movement, you will receive the notification that APP pushed. Powerful night vision The camera will automatically switch between infrared light and white light according to the current environment. You can also set the night vision mode in the app. It can capture clear images and videos in low-light or dark environments Multi-scenario installation Support for Under Ceiling installation and Wall Side installation Support TF Card Storage and Paid cloud storage The camera supports TF card local backup and also provides cloud storage service(Need to pay extra cost) P2P Remote Access Thanks to the convenient P2P technology, now you can view the live footage whenever you want to, just log in the P2P account on the app via your Smartphone or tablet and start monitoring your house in no time.
detail_html:
Tuya Smart 5MP Indoor Mini Surveillance Camera Wifi Wireless Cube Security CCTV Cameras Motion Detection Smart Home Baby Monitor

●Support 2.4Ghz WiFi
●5MP HD pixels
●Two-way Audio
●Human/Motion Detection
●Draw monitoring area and sound alarm
●Local storage(tf card) and Cloud storage(not free)
●Real-time viewing by multiple users
●Infrared/Color Night Vision
●Supports PC and mobile app remote control
●App: tuya smart
●Shipping time: Within 24 hours on working days.
●Warranty: 3-years
Follow us to get more offers and send free benefits to followers regularly.

Two Way Audio

Camera is built with microphone and speaker. So you can talk to your kids via your Smartphone remotely whenever you want.

MINI camera is easy to carry

The size of the main body of the camera is: 52*60*33mm, compact and easy to carry

HD 5MP High Definition Display

High-Definition interface output,Suport for online playback,Mobile remote,Multi-window display with 5MP Resolution.The angle will be more larger,and the image will be more clearer.

Motion Detection & Email Alert & Alarm Sound

Effectively filter invalid alarms and make the alarms more accurate, it only detects the human movement. When the camera detects the human movement, you will receive the notification that APP pushed.

Powerful night vision

The camera will automatically switch between infrared light and white light according to the current environment. You can also set the night vision mode in the app. It can capture clear images and videos in low-light or dark environments

Multi-scenario installation

Support for Under Ceiling installation and Wall Side installation

Support TF Card Storage and Paid cloud storage

The camera supports TF card local backup and also provides cloud storage service(Need to pay extra cost)

P2P Remote Access

Thanks to the convenient P2P technology, now you can view the live footage whenever you want to, just log in the P2P account on the app via your Smartphone or tablet and start monitoring your house in no time.

title: Prolink DS-3107 5MP 4MP 3MP Home Security Camera Full-HD Wifi IP Camera/ Home Security CCTV/ baby monitor (Pan/Tilt/Zoom) (mEzee app)
detail_text: 🟢 Cable Length: All cameras come with a 3-Pin UK Power Adapter + 2m Power Cord f or hassle-free setup. 🟢 Smart Home Control via mEzee App – Monitor and manage all your cameras in one place. Supports up to 512GB SD card, ONVIF compatible, with 2-way communication. Share app and view footage with family. 🟢 Share Cameras footages with Multiple Users/ phones: Create mEzee account 1st. Tap "..." > Share Device > Add > key in another mEzee account> Done (Up to 4 viewers can view footage at the same time.) Note: SD card and smart home camera are sold separately. When storage is full, old recordings will be automatically overwritten. Recordings can be viewed through the mEzee app ******************************************************************************* How to view playback after I inserted memory card through the camera? Insert microSD then restart camera For event recording (please enable local recording + motion detection enable) For continuous recording ( please sure enable local recording) Wait for 5~10min - then u can click the play back button NEW LAUNCH - Sept 2025 5MP 2.4/5GHz Home Security Camera: New Functions: ● Push-to-Talk button: At Home: One press for SOS — elderly can speak to the camera, while loved ones with the mEzee app can respond and view live footage. Ideal for those without smartphones and perfect for emergencies. Self-Checkout Stores / Customer Service: Customers at any store section (e.g., electronics, pharmacy) can press the button to request help, while staff can respond in real time via the app. Parking Lots / Drive-Thrus: Drivers can push to talk for assistance, inquiries, or SOS situations, with staff able to respond and see the live situation through the app. Office or Reception Desk: Visitors or delivery personnel can press the button to speak to the receptionist or office manager via the mEzee app without needing to find a phone or buzzer. Schools / Classrooms: Teachers or students can use it to request administrative help or communicate with staff in emergencies, with live visual confirmation. Enhanced Privacy Mode: Tilt the camera down at scheduled times via the app for added privacy and peace of mind. Retail or Commercial Spaces: Respect staff privacy during breaks or off-hours. Vacation Homes / Rentals: Guests can enjoy privacy at certain times, with the camera tilting down automatically according to schedules. ● 5MP Dual-Band Camera: Always use 5GHz Wi-Fi for smooth, clear viewing with minimal lag. Did we mentioned about having sharp 5MP resolution and clear footage, even at night. -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- What's in the box 1 x DS-3107 Security Camera 1 x 5V 1A USB-Type A Power Adapter (optional) 1 x 2 Meter USB-Type A to USB-Type C Cable 1 x Quick Installation Guide (QIG) 1 x Ceiling /Wall Mounting Kit ``````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````` ````````````````
detail_html:
🟢 Cable Length: All cameras come with a 3-Pin UK Power Adapter + 2m Power Cord for hassle-free setup.

🟢 Smart Home Control via mEzee App – Monitor and manage all your cameras in one place. Supports up to 512GB SD card, ONVIF compatible, with 2-way communication. Share app and view footage with family.

🟢Share Cameras footages with Multiple Users/ phones: Create mEzee account 1st. Tap "..." > Share Device > Add > key in another mEzee account> Done (Up to 4 viewers can view footage at the same time.)

Note: SD card and smart home camera are sold separately. When storage is full, old recordings will be automatically overwritten. Recordings can be viewed through the mEzee app

*******************************************************************************

How to view playback after I inserted memory card through the camera?

  1. Insert microSD then restart camera
  2. For event recording (please enable local recording + motion detection enable)
  3. For continuous recording ( please sure enable local recording)
  4. Wait for 5~10min - then u can click the play back button

NEW LAUNCH - Sept 2025

5MP 2.4/5GHz Home Security Camera:

New Functions:

● Push-to-Talk button:

  1. At Home: One press for SOS — elderly can speak to the camera, while loved ones with the mEzee app can respond and view live footage. Ideal for those without smartphones and perfect for emergencies.
  2. Self-Checkout Stores / Customer Service: Customers at any store section (e.g., electronics, pharmacy) can press the button to request help, while staff can respond in real time via the app.
  3. Parking Lots / Drive-Thrus: Drivers can push to talk for assistance, inquiries, or SOS situations, with staff able to respond and see the live situation through the app.
  4. Office or Reception Desk: Visitors or delivery personnel can press the button to speak to the receptionist or office manager via the mEzee app without needing to find a phone or buzzer.
  5. Schools / Classrooms: Teachers or students can use it to request administrative help or communicate with staff in emergencies, with live visual confirmation.

  • Enhanced Privacy Mode: Tilt the camera down at scheduled times via the app for added privacy and peace of mind.
  1. Retail or Commercial Spaces: Respect staff privacy during breaks or off-hours.
  2. Vacation Homes / Rentals: Guests can enjoy privacy at certain times, with the camera tilting down automatically according to schedules.

● 5MP Dual-Band Camera: Always use 5GHz Wi-Fi for smooth, clear viewing with minimal lag. Did we mentioned about having sharp 5MP resolution and clear footage, even at night.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

What's in the box

  • 1 x DS-3107 Security Camera
  • 1 x 5V 1A USB-Type A Power Adapter (optional)
  • 1 x 2 Meter USB-Type A to USB-Type C Cable
  • 1 x Quick Installation Guide (QIG)
  • 1 x Ceiling /Wall Mounting Kit

```````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````

````````````````

aiTexts: Prolink DS-3107 is a versatile home security IP camera offering 3MP, 4MP, and 5MP resolution options with 3K clarity and WDR for balanced images in low light.
It supports 360° horizontal rotation, 147° vertical tilt, and 6x digital zoom with a 110° wide-angle view for comprehensive coverage, including ceiling installation.
Equipped with enhanced privacy mode, the camera tilts down automatically from 10PM to 7AM to avoid recording, protecting user privacy.
Connectivity options include dual-band Wi-Fi (2.4/5GHz) and LAN, compatible with mEzee, Tuya Smart, Smart Life, and Onvif platforms.
The model features a one-touch call function enabling real-time voice communication for emergencies, ideal for monitoring elderly or children at home.

product.highlights:
• for DS-3107 (Dual-band camera)
  • When connected to the 5GHz wireless network, if you experience static sound (caused by 5GHz interference) when using the mic on the IPCam, you can try the following to minimise the static sound.
  • 1. Adjust the 5GHz wireless channel (in your wireless router settings) to a higher channel like CH149, 153, 157, 161 etc.
  • 2. Or remove the IPCam from the mEzee app and connect and setup using the 2.4GHz wireless network instead.
  • SD card is for storage, optional, to be purchased seperately
product.title: Prolink DS-3107 5MP 4MP 3MP Home Security Camera Full-HD Wifi IP Camera/ Home Security CCTV/ baby monitor (Pan/Tilt/Zoom) (mEzee app)

items.answer: Hi Alvin, correct! You can still view live footage through the app without recording the footage. This applies to all Prolink home security cameras. Thank you
items.question: for DS-3107 ...if we do not insert SD card..still can work via live viewing right?

items.answer: Hi there, the ip camera can support Tuya app. You may use 2.4Ghz to connect ip camera so it wouldn't congest the 5Ghz network that you usually use on your mobile, laptop etc,
items.question: Hi, can this be linked to Tuya App? Do you have 2.4g/5g model? I used 2.4g, but it tends to disconnect or slow the function. Your view pls.

items.answer: Hi John, yes you may purchase the Prolink USB adapter to power the camera. Thank you.
items.question: Can I also buy the adapter for the usb to at the the camera to power ?

title: Tuya Smart Mini 5MP WiFi IP Camera Indoor Wireless Color Night Home Security AI Human Detect CCTV Surveillance Block Camera
detail_text: Tuya Smart Mini 5MP WiFi IP Camera Indoor Wireless Color Night Home Security AI Human Detect CCTV Surveillance Block Camera Main Features: ● High Resolution : 5MP pixel ● The latest version supports humanoid detection . ● Clear Two-Way Audio The camera is built with a microphone and speaker. So you can talk to your kids via your smartphone remotely whenever you want. ● Work With 2.4G HZ WiFi The camera only support 2.4G HZ Wifi, don't support 5G HZ WiFi ● TF card & Cloud storage Supports micro SD cards up to 128 GB, and cloud storage(paid item, first month free) ● P2P Remote Access Thanks to the convenient P2P technology, Now you can view the live footage on the Tuya / Smart Life app ● Real Plug and Play By supporting a one-touch Wi-Fi connection function, not a single Ethernet cable is needed in the whole network connection process. ● Motion detection and Alarm Recording Motion detection works perfectly with App Message Alarm (No photo). Make sure you are always the first one to get informed when things happen. ● Support Multi-user Viewing Support Android iPhone IOS Smart Mobile Phone, Tablet, Laptop Use More Real-time Clear Two Way Audio Camera is built with microphone and speaker. So you can talk to your kids via your Smartphone remotely whenever you want. HD 5MP High Definition Display High-Definition interface output,Suport for online playback,Mobile remote,Multi-window display with 5MP Resolution.The angle will be more larger,and the image will be more clearer. Motion Detection Alarm Any suspicious movement thrown into the camera' eye will be detected and recorded, leaving thieves and robbers nowhere to hide. At the same time, you will receive instant APP alarm pushes on your smart devices wherever you are. Infrared & Full Color HD Night Vision Equipped with high power LED lights, more than 10m IR distance, 24 hours monitoring ,the Surveillance Camera shows clearly during the day in color, and at night with infrared illumination is excellent and clearly visible in b/w. Flexible & Secure Storage Options The camera supports up to 128GB TF card local backup and also provides cloud storage service(Need to pay extra cost) Wifi Camera has 2 installation methods Support for Under Ceiling installation and Wall Side installation P2P Remote Access Thanks to the convenient P2P technology, now you can view the live footage whenever you want to, just log in the P2P account on the app via your Smartphone or tablet and start monitoring your house in no time.
detail_html:
Tuya Smart Mini 5MP WiFi IP Camera Indoor Wireless Color Night Home Security AI Human Detect CCTV Surveillance Block Camera

Main Features:

● High Resolution : 5MP pixel
● The latest version supports humanoid detection .
● Clear Two-Way Audio
The camera is built with a microphone and speaker.
So you can talk to your kids via your smartphone remotely whenever you want.
● Work With 2.4G HZ WiFi
The camera only support 2.4G HZ Wifi, don't support 5G HZ WiFi
● TF card & Cloud storage
Supports micro SD cards up to 128 GB, and cloud storage(paid item, first month free)
● P2P Remote Access
Thanks to the convenient P2P technology,
Now you can view the live footage on the Tuya / Smart Life app
● Real Plug and Play
By supporting a one-touch Wi-Fi connection function,
not a single Ethernet cable is needed in the whole network connection process.
● Motion detection and Alarm Recording
Motion detection works perfectly with App Message Alarm (No photo). Make sure you are always the first one to get informed when things happen.
● Support Multi-user Viewing
Support Android iPhone IOS Smart Mobile Phone, Tablet,
Laptop Use More Real-time

Clear Two Way Audio

Camera is built with microphone and speaker. So you can talk to your kids via your Smartphone remotely whenever you want.

HD 5MP High Definition Display
High-Definition interface output,Suport for online playback,Mobile remote,Multi-window display with 5MP Resolution.The angle will be more larger,and the image will be more clearer.

Motion Detection Alarm
Any suspicious movement thrown into the camera' eye will be detected and recorded, leaving thieves and robbers nowhere to hide. At the same time, you will receive instant APP alarm pushes on your smart devices wherever you are.

Infrared & Full Color HD Night Vision
Equipped with high power LED lights, more than 10m IR distance,
24 hours monitoring ,the Surveillance Camera shows clearly during the day in color,
and at night with infrared illumination is excellent and clearly visible in b/w.

Flexible & Secure Storage Options
The camera supports up to 128GB TF card local backup and also provides cloud storage service(Need to pay extra cost)

Wifi Camera has 2 installation methods
Support for Under Ceiling installation and Wall Side installation

P2P Remote Access
Thanks to the convenient P2P technology, now you can view the live footage whenever you want to, just log in the P2P account on the app via your Smartphone or tablet and start monitoring your house in no time.

Make sure you are always the first one to get informed when things happen. ● Support Multi-user Viewing Support Android iPhone IOS Smart Mobile Phone, Tablet, Laptop Use More Real-time
Clear Two Way Audio Camera is built with microphone and speaker. So you can talk to your kids via your Smartphone remotely whenever you want.

HD 5MP High Definition Display High-Definition interface output,Suport for online playback,Mobile remote,Multi-window display with 5MP Resolution.The angle will be more larger,and the image will be more clearer.

Motion Detection Alarm Any suspicious movement thrown into the camera' eye will be detected and recorded, leaving thieves and robbers nowhere to hide. At the same time, you will receive instant APP alarm pushes on your smart devices wherever you are.

Infrared & Full Color HD Night Vision Equipped with high power LED lights, more than 10m IR distance, 24 hours monitoring ,the Surveillance Camera shows clearly during the day in color, and at night with infrared illumination is excellent and clearly visible in b/w.
Flexible & Secure Storage Options The camera supports up to 128GB TF card local backup and also provides cloud storage service(Need to pay extra cost)
Wifi Camera has 2 installation methods Support for Under Ceiling installation and Wall Side installation

P2P Remote Access Thanks to the convenient P2P technology, now you can view the live footage whenever you want to, just log in the P2P account on the app via your Smartphone or tablet and start monitoring your house in no time.

product.desc:
Tuya Smart Mini 5MP WiFi IP Camera Indoor Wireless Color Night Home Security AI Human Detect CCTV Surveillance Block Camera

Main Features:

● High Resolution : 5MP pixel
● The latest version supports humanoid detection .
● Clear Two-Way Audio
The camera is built with a microphone and speaker.
So you can talk to your kids via your smartphone remotely whenever you want.
● Work With 2.4G HZ WiFi
The camera only support 2.4G HZ Wifi, don't support 5G HZ WiFi
● TF card & Cloud storage
Supports micro SD cards up to 128 GB, and cloud storage(paid item, first month free)
● P2P Remote Access
Thanks to the convenient P2P technology,
Now you can view the live footage on the Tuya / Smart Life app
● Real Plug and Play
By supporting a one-touch Wi-Fi connection function,
not a single Ethernet cable is needed in the whole network connection process.
● Motion detection and Alarm Recording
Motion detection works perfectly with App Message Alarm (No photo). Make sure you are always the first one to get informed when things happen.
● Support Multi-user Viewing
Support Android iPhone IOS Smart Mobile Phone, Tablet,
Laptop Use More Real-time

Clear Two Way Audio

Camera is built with microphone and speaker. So you can talk to your kids via your Smartphone remotely whenever you want.

HD 5MP High Definition Display
High-Definition interface output,Suport for online playback,Mobile remote,Multi-window display with 5MP Resolution.The angle will be more larger,and the image will be more clearer.

Motion Detection Alarm
Any suspicious movement thrown into the camera' eye will be detected and recorded, leaving thieves and robbers nowhere to hide. At the same time, you will receive instant APP alarm pushes on your smart devices wherever you are.

Infrared & Full Color HD Night Vision
Equipped with high power LED lights, more than 10m IR distance,
24 hours monitoring ,the Surveillance Camera shows clearly during the day in color,
and at night with infrared illumination is excellent and clearly visible in b/w.

Flexible & Secure Storage Options
The camera supports up to 128GB TF card local backup and also provides cloud storage service(Need to pay extra cost)

Wifi Camera has 2 installation methods
Support for Under Ceiling installation and Wall Side installation

P2P Remote Access
Thanks to the convenient P2P technology, now you can view the live footage whenever you want to, just log in the P2P account on the app via your Smartphone or tablet and start monitoring your house in no time.

title: TP-Link Tapo C206/C216/C236/C245D/C246D | 2K Full Color | Night Vision | AI Motion Tracking | Outdoor & Indoor | Dual Lens | WiFi CCTV Camera
detail_text: Tapo C246D/TC34 Indoor/Outdoor Dual Lens Pan/Tilt Security Camera 2K 3MP Dual Lens - Capture the full picture with dual 2K high definition optics, monitoring two separate areas at the same time with just one device. Engineered to minimize blind spots for optimal coverage. Wide-angle & Telephoto Lens - With 125° FOV wide-angle lens and 6mm telephoto lens, it ensures all-around awareness and down-to-the-detail protection of your home. Synchronized Smart Tracking - When the fixed lens detects events, the pan/tilt lens will automatically pivot to focus on and track the moving object. One-Tap Smart Focus - Select an area in the wide-angle view, and the pan/tilt camera will focus on it instantly. Flexible Indoor and Outdoor Placement - From the backyard to the nursery, lP65 weatherproofing provides dependable, crystal-clear security—indoors or outdoors, rain or shine. Free AI Detection & Notification - Get instant push notifications when motion, person, pets, vehicles or even baby cry are detected, there is no additional fee to use it. Works with Alexa, Google Home & Samsung SmartThings - Fully compatible with Amazon Alexa and Google Assistant, use your simple voice command to view Tapo indoor/outdoor home security wi-fi camera live stream. Smart Night Vision -Choose from vibrant full-color with spotlights, discreet black-and-white infrared, or an automatic Smart Mode based on Al light detection for optimal clarity in any nighttime scenario. Secure Local or Cloud Storage - Save footage continuously on up to a 512 GB microSD card (not included) or subscribe to Tapo Care for cloud storage which saves 30-day video. 2-Way Audio - Engage in seamless, real-time conversations with our two-way audio feature, designed for minimal latency and exceptional sound clarity. detail_html:
Tapo C246D/TC34

Indoor/Outdoor Dual Lens Pan/Tilt Security Camera

  • 2K 3MP Dual Lens - Capture the full picture with dual 2K high definition optics, monitoring two separate areas at the same time with just one device. Engineered to minimize blind spots for optimal coverage.
  • Wide-angle & Telephoto Lens - With 125° FOV wide-angle lens and 6mm telephoto lens, it ensures all-around awareness and down-to-the-detail protection of your home.
  • Synchronized Smart Tracking - When the fixed lens detects events, the pan/tilt lens will automatically pivot to focus on and track the moving object.
  • One-Tap Smart Focus - Select an area in the wide-angle view, and the pan/tilt camera will focus on it instantly.
  • Flexible Indoor and Outdoor Placement - From the backyard to the nursery, lP65 weatherproofing provides dependable, crystal-clear security—indoors or outdoors, rain or shine.
  • Free AI Detection & Notification - Get instant push notifications when motion, person, pets, vehicles or even baby cry are detected, there is no additional fee to use it.
  • Works with Alexa, Google Home & Samsung SmartThings - Fully compatible with Amazon Alexa and Google Assistant, use your simple voice command to view Tapo indoor/outdoor home security wi-fi camera live stream.
  • Smart Night Vision -Choose from vibrant full-color with spotlights, discreet black-and-white infrared, or an automatic Smart Mode based on Al light detection for optimal clarity in any nighttime scenario.
  • Secure Local or Cloud Storage - Save footage continuously on up to a 512 GB microSD card (not included) or subscribe to Tapo Care for cloud storage which saves 30-day video.
  • 2-Way Audio - Engage in seamless, real-time conversations with our two-way audio feature, designed for minimal latency and exceptional sound clarity.
  • Power Cord Length: 3m

Tapo C245D

Dual Lens Pan/Tilt Security Camera

  • 2K 3MP Dual Lens - Capture the full picture with dual 2K high definition optics, monitoring two separate areas at the same time with just one device. Engineered to minimize blind spots for optimal coverage.
  • Wide-angle & Telephoto Lens - With 122° FOV wide-angle lens and 6mm telephoto lens, it ensures all-around awareness and down-to-the-detail protection of your home.
  • Synchronized Smart Tracking - When the fixed lens detects events, the pan/tilt lens will automatically pivot to focus on and track the moving object.
  • One-Tap Smart Focus - Select an area in the wide-angle view, and the pan/tilt camera will focus on it instantly.
  • Free Smart Dual AI Detection & Notification - Get instant push notifications when motion, person, pets, vehicles or even baby cry are detected, there is no additional fee to use it.
  • Works with Alexa, Google Home & Samsung SmartThings - Fully compatible with Amazon Alexa and Google Assistant, use your simple voice command to view Tapo indoor/outdoor home security wi-fi camera live stream.
  • Night Vision up to 40 ft -Even in complete darkness, an advanced IR algorithm delivers clear black-and-white footage.
  • Secure Local or Cloud Storage - Save footage continuously on up to a 512 GB microSD card (not included) or subscribe to Tapo Care for cloud storage which saves 30-day video.
  • 2-Way Audio - Engage in seamless, real-time conversations with our two-way audio feature, designed for minimal latency and exceptional sound clarity.

Tapo C216

Indoor/Outdoor Home Security Wi-Fi Camera

  • Add Security to Your Home. Wherever. Whenever: Enjoy flexible placement indoors or outdoors. Get all-round protection with a 2K 3MP live view, displaying vivid colors even at night.
  • Smart AI Detection and Notifications: Identifies people and detects crying babies, notifying users as needed.
  • Motion Detection and Tracking: Whenever a camera detects motion, it will automatically follow the subject.
  • Pan and Tilt: Enjoy a full 340º horizontal and 105º vertical, allowing you to cover more area.
  • Vivid Colors, Even at Night: Instead of black-and-white images, Tapo C216 offers full-color images at night with built-in spotlights, ensuring details in low-light conditions.
  • Sound and Light Alarm: Scare away unwanted visitors using a sound and light alarm that triggers attention-grabbing effects.
  • Two-Way Audio: Enables communication through a built-in microphone and speaker.
  • Local and Cloud Storage: Save recorded videos to a microSD card (up to 512 GB) or by using Tapo Care cloud storage services.
  • Compact Design for Multiple Installation Power Cord Length Methods: It can be placed upright or upside down, on a desk, hung on a wall, mounted on the ceiling, or held by a rod.
  • Power Cord Length: 2m

  • Compact Design for Multiple Installation Methods: It can be placed upright or upside down, on a desk, hung on a wall, mounted on the ceiling, or held by a rod.
  • Power Cord Length: 2m

Tapo C236

New

Indoor/Outdoor Home Security Wi-Fi Camera

  • Add Security to Your Home. Wherever. Whenever: Enjoy flexible placement indoors or outdoors. Get all-round protection with a 2K 3MP live view, displaying vivid colors even at night.
  • 3K 5MP Resolution: Say goodbye to blurry images and enjoy more details in high-quality live view with 3K 5MP resolution.

aiTexts: This TP-Link Tapo C216 Wi-Fi Security Camera offers 2K 3MP full-color night vision for vivid, detailed surveillance indoors and outdoors.
It features a 360° horizontal and 152° vertical pan-tilt range, ensuring broad coverage with automatic AI motion tracking to follow detected subjects.
Smart AI detection distinguishes people and crying babies, triggering notifications for enhanced security.
Built-in spotlights provide color images in low light, supported by sound and light alarms to deter intruders.
Two-way audio enables real-time communication via microphone and speaker.
Storage options include microSD card support up to 512GB and optional Tapo cloud storage.
The camera allows flexible installation (wall, ceiling, desk) and integrates with Alexa, Google Home, and Samsung SmartThings for smart home control.
Privacy zones can be customized to protect sensitive areas, making it ideal for families and users seeking advanced, reliable home security.

  • Synchronized Smart Tracking - When the fixed lens detects events, the pan/tilt lens will automatically pivot to focus on and track the moving object.
  • One-Tap Smart Focus - Select an area in the wide-angle view, and the pan/tilt camera will focus on it instantly.
  • Flexible Indoor and Outdoor Placement - From the backyard to the nursery, lP65 weatherproofing provides dependable, crystal-clear security—indoors or outdoors, rain or shine.
  • Free AI Detection & Notification - Get instant push notifications when motion, person, pets, vehicles or even baby cry are detected, there is no additional fee to use it.
  • Works with Alexa, Google Home & Samsung SmartThings - Fully compatible with Amazon Alexa and Google Assistant, use your simple voice command to view Tapo indoor/outdoor home security wi-fi camera live stream.
  • Smart Night Vision -Choose from vibrant full-color with spotlights, discreet black-and-white infrared, or an automatic Smart Mode based on Al light detection for optimal clarity in any nighttime scenario.
  • Secure Local or Cloud Storage - Save footage continuously on up to a 512 GB microSD card (not included) or subscribe to Tapo Care for cloud storage which saves 30-day video.
  • 2-Way Audio - Engage in seamless, real-time conversations with our two-way audio feature, designed for minimal latency and exceptional sound clarity.
  • Power Cord Length: 3m

Tapo C245D

Dual Lens Pan/Tilt Security Camera

  • 2K 3MP Dual Lens - Capture the full picture with dual 2K high definition optics, monitoring two separate areas at the same time with just one device. Engineered to minimize blind spots for optimal coverage.
  • Wide-angle & Telephoto Lens - With 122° FOV wide-angle lens and 6mm telephoto lens, it ensures all-around awareness and down-to-the-detail protection of your home.
  • Synchronized Smart Tracking - When the fixed lens detects events, the pan/tilt lens will automatically pivot to focus on and track the moving object.
  • One-Tap Smart Focus - Select an area in the wide-angle view, and the pan/tilt camera will focus on it instantly.
  • Free Smart Dual AI Detection & Notification - Get instant push notifications when motion, person, pets, vehicles or even baby cry are detected, there is no additional fee to use it.
  • Works with Alexa, Google Home & Samsung SmartThings - Fully compatible with Amazon Alexa and Google Assistant, use your simple voice command to view Tapo indoor/outdoor home security wi-fi camera live stream.
  • Night Vision up to 40 ft -Even in complete darkness, an advanced IR algorithm delivers clear black-and-white footage.
  • Secure Local or Cloud Storage - Save footage continuously on up to a 512 GB microSD card (not included) or subscribe to Tapo Care for cloud storage which saves 30-day video.
  • 2-Way Audio - Engage in seamless, real-time conversations with our two-way audio feature, designed for minimal latency and exceptional sound clarity.

Tapo C216

Indoor/Outdoor Home Security Wi-Fi Camera

  • Add Security to Your Home. Wherever. Whenever: Enjoy flexible placement indoors or outdoors. Get all-round protection with a 2K 3MP live view, displaying vivid colors even at night.
  • Smart AI Detection and Notifications: Identifies people and detects crying babies, notifying users as needed.
  • Motion Detection and Tracking: Whenever a camera detects motion, it will automatically follow the subject.
  • Pan and Tilt: Enjoy a full 340º horizontal and 105º vertical, allowing you to cover more area.
  • Vivid Colors, Even at Night: Instead of black-and-white images, Tapo C216 offers full-color images at night with built-in spotlights, ensuring details in low-light conditions.
  • Sound and Light Alarm: Scare away unwanted visitors using a sound and light alarm that triggers attention-grabbing effects.
  • Two-Way Audio: Enables communication through a built-in microphone and speaker.
  • Local and Cloud Storage: Save recorded videos to a microSD card (up to 512 GB) or by using Tapo Care cloud storage services.
  • Compact Design for Multiple Installation Power Cord Length Methods: It can be placed upright or upside down, on a desk, hung on a wall, mounted on the ceiling, or held by a rod.
  • Power Cord Length: 2m

Tapo C206

Indoor/Outdoor Home Security Wi-Fi Camera

  • Add Security to Your Home. Wherever. Whenever: Enjoy flexible placement indoors or outdoors. Get all-round protection with a 1080p Full HD live view, displaying vivid colors even at night.
  • Smart AI Detection and Notifications: Identifies people and detects crying babies, notifying users as needed.
  • Motion Detection and Tracking: Whenever a camera detects motion, it will automatically follow the subject.
