  • Compact Design for Multiple Installation Methods: It can be placed upright or upside down, on a desk, hung on a wall, mounted on the ceiling, or held by a rod.
  • Power Cord Length: 2m

Tapo C236

New

Indoor/Outdoor Home Security Wi-Fi Camera

  • Add Security to Your Home. Wherever. Whenever: Enjoy flexible placement indoors or outdoors. Get all-round protection with a 2K 3MP live view, displaying vivid colors even at night.
  • 3K 5MP Resolution: Say goodbye to blurry images and enjoy more details in high-quality live view with 3K 5MP resolution.
  • Smart AI Detection and Notifications: Identifies people and detects crying babies, notifying users as needed.
  • Motion Detection and Tracking: Whenever a camera detects motion, it will automatically follow the subject.
  • Pan and Tilt: Enjoy a full 360º horizontal and 152º vertical, allowing you to cover more area.
  • Vivid Colors, Even at Night: Instead of black-and-white images, Tapo C216 offers full-color images at night with built-in spotlights, ensuring details in low-light conditions.
  • Sound and Light Alarm: Scare away unwanted visitors using a sound and light alarm that triggers attention-grabbing effects.
  • Two-Way Audio: Enables communication through a built-in microphone and speaker.
  • Local and Cloud Storage: Save recorded videos to a microSD card (up to 512 GB) or by using Tapo Care cloud storage services.
  • Compact Design for Multiple Installation Methods: It can be placed upright or upside down, on a desk, hung on a wall, mounted on the ceiling, or held by a rod.

KEY FEATURES 2K Ultra HD (2560 × 1440) Sharp 4MP clarity delivers crisp details day and night. Two-Way Audio Speak and listen in real time through the GXM app. Smart Motion Alerts Receive instant notifications when motion is detected. 100% Wire-Free & Rechargeable Built-in 6400mAh battery — no power cables required. ⏳ Up to 120 Days Battery Life* Long-lasting performance under typical usage conditions. Advanced Infrared Night Vision Clear visibility up to 10 metres in complete darkness. IP66 Weatherproof Designed for reliable outdoor use — rain or shine. Wide Viewing Angle 145° Diagonal · 118° Horizontal · 63° Vertical coverage. Multi-Camera View Monitor up to 16 cameras simultaneously via the GXM app. Ad-Free App Experience Enjoy a clean, distraction-free interface. Flexible Storage Options Supports microSD card (up to 256GB) with optional cloud backup. Singapore Local Brand Includes 1-Year Local Warranty with dedicated after-sales support. ⸻ EASY INSTALLATION Install your way: • 3M Adhesive (smooth surfaces) • Magnetic Base • Screw Mount No complicated wiring required. ⸻ SETUP INSTRUCTIONS 1. Download the “GXM” App (Free) from App Store or Google Play 2. Allow all permissions (Android users: enable Location) 3. Register your account 4. Tap “+” to add device 5. Scan the QR code at the back of the camera 6. Connect to 2.4GHz Wi-Fi 7. Let the camera scan the QR code shown on your phone 8. Name your device — Setup Complete ⸻ WHAT’S IN THE BOX • 1 × W3 Pro Camera • 1 × 6cm Magnetic Base • 1 × 0.5m Type-C Charging Cable • 1 × 3M Adhesive Sticker • 1 × Screw Kit • 1 × English User Manual ⸻ PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS Resolution: 2K (2560 × 1440) Battery: 6400mAh Rechargeable Battery Life: Up to 120 Days* Wi-Fi: 2.4GHz Only Audio: Two-Way Talk Charging Port: Type-C Waterproof Rating: IP66 Motion Detection Range: 3–5m Weight: 256g Colour Options: Space Grey / White Product Size: • With Base: 10 × 8 × 6cm • Without Base: 6 × 8 × 6cm ⸻ LOCAL RECORDING & STORAGE • Motion-based recording to optimise battery life • Supports microSD card up to 256GB • Automatic overwrite when storage is full A bundled microSD card (if selected) is included for compatibility and convenience. Optional Memory Card Add-on: SanDisk Ultra® microSDXC™ UHS-I Card ( 7-Year SanDisk Singapore Warranty) ⸻ ☁ CLOUD STORAGE (Optional) Cloud subscription starts from US$1.99 for 6 months Local recording works independently with microSD card. ⸻ Important Notes Battery life and recording duration may vary depending on usage frequency, environment, and settings. ⸻ COMMON Q&A ⭐ Q1) Does it require Wi-Fi? A1) Yes. The camera supports 2.4GHz Wi-Fi only . If your router uses both 2.4GHz and 5GHz under one name, connect as usual. If two network names are shown, please select 2.4GHz during setup. For “Unknown ID” issues, enable Location and refresh the Wi-Fi list. ⭐ Q2) Does it record 24/7? A2) By default, recording is motion-based to save battery. If connected to continuous power (via cable), you may enable 24/7 recording mode . ⭐ Q3) Can the camera really last 120 days? A3) Yes, under typical usage. In high-traffic areas (e.g. living room), battery life may reduce depending on activity frequency. ⭐ Q4) Do I need to buy a memory card? A4) A microSD card is required for local video recording and playback . You may choose different capacities based on your needs. For longer recording history and convenience, 128GB is recommended . ⸻ ⭐️Q5) Does the camera work without Wi-Fi? A5) No. Wi-Fi is required for live view, notifications, and remote access. Without Wi-Fi, the camera cannot function normally. ⭐️Q6) Can I watch recordings without subscribing to cloud storage? A6) Yes. You can view and playback recordings directly from the microSD card without any cloud subscription. Cloud storage is optional and used only for backup and remote access convenience. ⸻ ⭐️Q7) Can I share the camera with my family members? A7) Yes. You can share camera access with family members via the GXM app. Multiple users can view live footage at the same time. Many low-cost, no-name security cameras compromise user privacy and display intrusive ads. Always choose trusted brands to ensure data security and a reliable user experience. ⸻ STORE PICK-UP & SERVICE CENTRE 1 Yishun Industrial Street 1, #05-24, A’POSH Bizhub, Singapore 768160 Mon–Fri: 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM Sat: 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM (Closed on Public Holidays) RETAIL EXPERIENCE SHOP NEX Serangoon, #03-29 Open Daily: 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM
detail_html:
Spend $100 or more in our store and receive a FREE Portable Neck Fan (worth $12.90) while stocks last!

KEY FEATURES

2K Ultra HD (2560 × 1440)

Sharp 4MP clarity delivers crisp details day and night.

Two-Way Audio

Speak and listen in real time through the GXM app.

Smart Motion Alerts

Receive instant notifications when motion is detected.

100% Wire-Free & Rechargeable

Built-in 6400mAh battery — no power cables required.

⏳ Up to 120 Days Battery Life*

Long-lasting performance under typical usage conditions.

Advanced Infrared Night Vision

Clear visibility up to 10 metres in complete darkness.

IP66 Weatherproof

Designed for reliable outdoor use — rain or shine.

Wide Viewing Angle

145° Diagonal · 118° Horizontal · 63° Vertical coverage.

Multi-Camera View

Monitor up to 16 cameras simultaneously via the GXM app.

Ad-Free App Experience

Enjoy a clean, distraction-free interface.

Flexible Storage Options

Supports microSD card (up to 256GB) with optional cloud backup.

Singapore Local Brand

Includes 1-Year Local Warranty with dedicated after-sales support.

⸻

EASY INSTALLATION

Install your way:

• 3M Adhesive (smooth surfaces)

• Magnetic Base

• Screw Mount

No complicated wiring required.

⸻

SETUP INSTRUCTIONS

1. Download the “GXM” App (Free) from App Store or Google Play

2. Allow all permissions (Android users: enable Location)

3. Register your account

4. Tap “+” to add device

5. Scan the QR code at the back of the camera

6. Connect to 2.4GHz Wi-Fi

7. Let the camera scan the QR code shown on your phone

8. Name your device — Setup Complete

⸻

WHAT’S IN THE BOX

• 1 × W3 Pro Camera

• 1 × 6cm Magnetic Base

• 1 × 0.5m Type-C Charging Cable

• 1 × 3M Adhesive Sticker

• 1 × Screw Kit

• 1 × English User Manual

⸻

PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS

Resolution: 2K (2560 × 1440)

Battery: 6400mAh Rechargeable

Battery Life: Up to 120 Days*

Wi-Fi: 2.4GHz Only

Audio: Two-Way Talk

Charging Port: Type-C

Waterproof Rating: IP66

Motion Detection Range: 3–5m

Weight: 256g

Colour Options: Space Grey / White

Product Size:

• With Base: 10 × 8 × 6cm

• Without Base: 6 × 8 × 6cm

⸻

LOCAL RECORDING & STORAGE

• Motion-based recording to optimise battery life

• Supports microSD card up to 256GB

• Automatic overwrite when storage is full

A bundled microSD card (if selected) is included for compatibility and convenience.

Optional Memory Card Add-on:

SanDisk Ultra® microSDXC™ UHS-I Card ( 7-Year SanDisk Singapore Warranty)

⸻

☁ CLOUD STORAGE (Optional)

Cloud subscription starts from US$1.99 for 6 months

Local recording works independently with microSD card.

⸻

Important Notes

Battery life and recording duration may vary depending on usage frequency, environment, and settings.

⸻

COMMON Q&A

⭐ Q1) Does it require Wi-Fi?

A1) Yes. The camera supports 2.4GHz Wi-Fi only.

If your router uses both 2.4GHz and 5GHz under one name, connect as usual.

If two network names are shown, please select 2.4GHz during setup.

For “Unknown ID” issues, enable Location and refresh the Wi-Fi list.

⭐ Q2) Does it record 24/7?

A2) By default, recording is motion-based to save battery.

If connected to continuous power (via cable), you may enable 24/7 recording mode.

⭐ Q3) Can the camera really last 120 days?

A3) Yes, under typical usage.

In high-traffic areas (e.g. living room), battery life may reduce depending on activity frequency.

⭐ Q4) Do I need to buy a memory card?

A4) A microSD card is required for local video recording and playback.

You may choose different capacities based on your needs.

For longer recording history and convenience, 128GB is recommended.

⸻

⭐️Q5) Does the camera work without Wi-Fi?

A5)

No. Wi-Fi is required for live view, notifications, and remote access.

Without Wi-Fi, the camera cannot function normally.

⭐️Q6) Can I watch recordings without subscribing to cloud storage?

A6)

Yes. You can view and playback recordings directly from the microSD card without any cloud subscription.

Cloud storage is optional and used only for backup and remote access convenience.

⸻

⭐️Q7) Can I share the camera with my family members?

A7)

Yes. You can share camera access with family members via the GXM app.

Multiple users can view live footage at the same time.

Many low-cost, no-name security cameras compromise user privacy and display intrusive ads.

Always choose trusted brands to ensure data security and a reliable user experience.

⸻

STORE PICK-UP & SERVICE CENTRE

1 Yishun Industrial Street 1, #05-24, A’POSH Bizhub, Singapore 768160

Mon–Fri: 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM

Sat: 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM

(Closed on Public Holidays)

RETAIL EXPERIENCE SHOP

NEX Serangoon, #03-29

Open Daily: 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM

aiTexts: GXM W3 Pro is a 4MP 2K Ultra HD wireless security camera delivering sharp 2560×1440 resolution for clear day and night footage.
Features include two-way audio for real-time communication and smart motion alerts for instant notifications on detected activity.
Powered by a 6400mAh rechargeable battery, it offers up to 120 days of operation without wires.
The camera is IP66 weatherproof with advanced infrared night vision up to 10m, perfect for outdoor monitoring.
Installation is simple with magnetic base, 3M adhesive, or screw mounting options.
Wide 145° viewing angle and support for up to 16 cameras via the app enable comprehensive surveillance.
Flexible storage options include local microSD card (up to 256GB) and optional cloud backup.
Compatible with Google Assistant and Alexa, it suits homes, offices, and commercial spaces needing reliable, ad-free security monitoring.
aiDescription.aiTip: AI-generated content for reference purposes only.

brand.name: GXM
brand.suggestion: More Surveillance Cameras & Systems from GXM

product.desc:
Spend $100 or more in our store and receive a FREE Portable Neck Fan (worth $12.90) while stocks last!

KEY FEATURES

2K Ultra HD (2560 × 1440)

Sharp 4MP clarity delivers crisp details day and night.

Two-Way Audio

Speak and listen in real time through the GXM app.

Smart Motion Alerts

Receive instant notifications when motion is detected.

100% Wire-Free & Rechargeable

Built-in 6400mAh battery — no power cables required.

⏳ Up to 120 Days Battery Life*

Long-lasting performance under typical usage conditions.

Advanced Infrared Night Vision

Clear visibility up to 10 metres in complete darkness.

IP66 Weatherproof

Designed for reliable outdoor use — rain or shine.

Wide Viewing Angle

145° Diagonal · 118° Horizontal · 63° Vertical coverage.

Multi-Camera View

Monitor up to 16 cameras simultaneously via the GXM app.

Ad-Free App Experience

Enjoy a clean, distraction-free interface.

Flexible Storage Options

Supports microSD card (up to 256GB) with optional cloud backup.

Singapore Local Brand

Includes 1-Year Local Warranty with dedicated after-sales support.

⸻

EASY INSTALLATION

Install your way:

• 3M Adhesive (smooth surfaces)

• Magnetic Base

• Screw Mount

No complicated wiring required.

⸻

SETUP INSTRUCTIONS

1. Download the “GXM” App (Free) from App Store or Google Play

2. Allow all permissions (Android users: enable Location)

3. Register your account

4. Tap “+” to add device

5. Scan the QR code at the back of the camera

6. Connect to 2.4GHz Wi-Fi

7. Let the camera scan the QR code shown on your phone

8. Name your device — Setup Complete

⸻

WHAT’S IN THE BOX

• 1 × W3 Pro Camera

• 1 × 6cm Magnetic Base

• 1 × 0.5m Type-C Charging Cable

• 1 × 3M Adhesive Sticker

• 1 × Screw Kit

• 1 × English User Manual

⸻

PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS

Resolution: 2K (2560 × 1440)

Battery: 6400mAh Rechargeable

Battery Life: Up to 120 Days*

Wi-Fi: 2.4GHz Only

Audio: Two-Way Talk

Charging Port: Type-C

Waterproof Rating: IP66

Motion Detection Range: 3–5m

Weight: 256g

Colour Options: Space Grey / White

Product Size:

• With Base: 10 × 8 × 6cm

• Without Base: 6 × 8 × 6cm

⸻

LOCAL RECORDING & STORAGE

• Motion-based recording to optimise battery life

• Supports microSD card up to 256GB

• Automatic overwrite when storage is full

A bundled microSD card (if selected) is included for compatibility and convenience.

Optional Memory Card Add-on:

SanDisk Ultra® microSDXC™ UHS-I Card ( 7-Year SanDisk Singapore Warranty)

⸻

☁ CLOUD STORAGE (Optional)

Cloud subscription starts from US$1.99 for 6 months

Local recording works independently with microSD card.

⸻

Important Notes

Battery life and recording duration may vary depending on usage frequency, environment, and settings.

⸻

COMMON Q&A

⭐ Q1) Does it require Wi-Fi?

A1) Yes. The camera supports 2.4GHz Wi-Fi only.

If your router uses both 2.4GHz and 5GHz under one name, connect as usual.

If two network names are shown, please select 2.4GHz during setup.

For “Unknown ID” issues, enable Location and refresh the Wi-Fi list.

⭐ Q2) Does it record 24/7?

A2) By default, recording is motion-based to save battery.

If connected to continuous power (via cable), you may enable 24/7 recording mode.

⭐ Q3) Can the camera really last 120 days?

A3) Yes, under typical usage.

In high-traffic areas (e.g. living room), battery life may reduce depending on activity frequency.

⭐ Q4) Do I need to buy a memory card?

A4) A microSD card is required for local video recording and playback.

You may choose different capacities based on your needs.

For longer recording history and convenience, 128GB is recommended.

⸻

⭐️Q5) Does the camera work without Wi-Fi?

A5)

No. Wi-Fi is required for live view, notifications, and remote access.

Without Wi-Fi, the camera cannot function normally.

⭐️Q6) Can I watch recordings without subscribing to cloud storage?

A6)

Yes. You can view and playback recordings directly from the microSD card without any cloud subscription.

Cloud storage is optional and used only for backup and remote access convenience.

⸻

⭐️Q7) Can I share the camera with my family members?

A7)

Yes. You can share camera access with family members via the GXM app.

Multiple users can view live footage at the same time.

Many low-cost, no-name security cameras compromise user privacy and display intrusive ads.

Always choose trusted brands to ensure data security and a reliable user experience.

⸻

STORE PICK-UP & SERVICE CENTRE

1 Yishun Industrial Street 1, #05-24, A’POSH Bizhub, Singapore 768160

Mon–Fri: 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM

Sat: 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM

(Closed on Public Holidays)

RETAIL EXPERIENCE SHOP

NEX Serangoon, #03-29

Open Daily: 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM

aiTexts: Tapo 360 WIFI 2K QHD AI Home Security IP Camera offers 360° horizontal and 114° vertical wide-angle coverage for comprehensive, no blind spot monitoring.
Features 2K QHD (4MP) and 5MP resolution for clear, detailed video recordings in both day and night.
Equipped with advanced 850nm infrared night vision with up to 30 feet viewing distance, including full-color night mode.
Includes AI smart detection for humans, pets, vehicles, and baby cries, plus motion tracking, sound and light alerts, and two-way audio.
Supports wireless connection, MicroSD card storage up to 512GB on select models, compatible with Google Home and tapocare service.
Ideal for families monitoring children or pets, users seeking high security and privacy, and those needing smart, reliable home surveillance.
Powered by 100-240V with 3-pin plug, includes 4-channel recorder capacity, and backed by a 3-year local manufacturer warranty in Singapore.

product.desc:
LATEST MODEL C72 WITH 4 MP, highest video quality among the Tapo Series

🚚 LOCAL SELLER, READY STOCK // SHIPPING FROM SG

🔥 FAST DELIVERY // WITHIN 1-3 WORKING DAYS

By Ban Leong Service Centre (Provide proof of purchase at Ban Leong to claim warranty)

For further enquiries or assistance, our customer service will be glad to help.

HIGHLIGHTS

🔹【High Definition Video】Capture every detail in crystal-clear definition.

🔹【Advanced Night View】With 850 nm infrared night vision supports automatic color switch filter in low light conditions with a visual distance of up to 30 ft.

🔹【Motion Detection and Notifications】Receive a notification if something suspected is detected.

🔹【Sound and Light Alarm】Trigger light and sound effects to frighten away unwanted visitors.

🔹【Two-Way Audio】Communicate with others with the built-in microphone and speaker.

🔹【Easy setup】with soft AP configuration

🔹【Turn on Privacy Mode】which can physically close the lens of camera to further ensure the safety of privacy.

🔹【Safe Storage】Support MicroSD Card (up to 128 GB) for TC70 and (up to 256 GB) for Tapo C210

🌀Button: Reset button

🌀Night Vision: 850 nm IR LED up to 30 ft

🌀View Range: 360° horizontal, 114° vertical

🌀Audio Communication: 2-way audio

🌀Audio Input & Output: Built-in microphone and speaker

🌀Security: 128 bit AES encryption with SSL/TLS

🌀Frequency: 2.4 GHz

Tapo C71 (Formerly Known As C210)

Smart AI Detection and Notification -Smart AI identifies people, pets, and abnormal sounds, notifying users as needed. Freely Install with Magnetic Base - The compact design of Tapo C125 enables users to freely install it with a magnetic base and flexible bracket Dual-IR System - Switch to the 940nm IR LED to watch over your baby without interrupting their sleep. Customizable Sound Alarm - Triggers recorded audio as an alarm when motion is detected. Tapo C120 Tapo Indoor/Outdoor Wi-Fi Home Security Camera Indoor & Outdoor 24/7 Monitoring - Place it in your living room, bedroom, baby's room, backyard, or front door for round-the-clock coverage and IP66 weatherproof construction: day, night, rain, or shine. 2K Color Night Vision - With an integrated starlight sensor, the C120 captures low light images in incredibly high definition colorful detail up to 98 ft. away—see beyond what the naked eye can see! 2K Clarity During the Day - When it comes to your home's protection, the details matter! 2K QHD clarity goes beyond traditional FullHD 1080p resolution so that no details will go undetected or blurred Built-In Dual Spotlights - With Tapo C120's dual spotlights, pierce through the darkness and low light conditions for an enhanced viewing experience at night while still being displayed in full color Ultra Easy & Hassle-Free Installation - Installation and mounting are a breeze with the C120's strong and adjustable magnetic base while its 9.8 ft. power cord grants you the flexibility to place it virtually anywhere Optional Invisible Infared Lights - If the red IR LEDs are a distraction to you, your children, or your pets, you may switch to invisible IR mode to continue monitoring throughout the night but without the red IR indicator FREE Smart AI Detection - Smart AI technology detects and identifies people, pets, and vehicles, sending you only relevant notifications while effectively avoiding unnecessary alerts Customizable Sound & Light Alarm - Record your own audio to use as an alarm and adjust the brightness of the spotlight to suit your preferences for a completely customized alarm system to deter intruders Full Duplex Two-Way Audio - Listen and speak to guests, delivery drivers, and pets on the other side of the camera with enhanced clarity thanks to Tapo C120's premium microphone and speakers. Cross-Line Detection - Manually set no-go zones through the free Tapo Care app then be immediately alerted when movement is detected within or around this restricted area. detail_html:
Tapo C125

AI Home Security Wi-Fi Camera

  • Physical Privacy Shutter- When enabled, maintains your privacy with the lens blocked by the camera’s shutter.
  • Smart AI Detection and Notification-Smart AI identifies people, pets, and abnormal sounds, notifying users as needed.
  • Freely Install with Magnetic Base - The compact design of Tapo C125 enables users to freely install it with a magnetic base and flexible bracket
  • Dual-IR System - Switch to the 940nm IR LED to watch over your baby without interrupting their sleep.
  • Customizable Sound Alarm - Triggers recorded audio as an alarm when motion is detected.

Tapo C120

Tapo Indoor/Outdoor Wi-Fi Home Security Camera

  • Indoor & Outdoor 24/7 Monitoring - Place it in your living room, bedroom, baby's room, backyard, or front door for round-the-clock coverage and IP66 weatherproof construction: day, night, rain, or shine.
  • 2K Color Night Vision - With an integrated starlight sensor, the C120 captures low light images in incredibly high definition colorful detail up to 98 ft. away—see beyond what the naked eye can see!
  • 2K Clarity During the Day - When it comes to your home's protection, the details matter! 2K QHD clarity goes beyond traditional FullHD 1080p resolution so that no details will go undetected or blurred
  • Built-In Dual Spotlights - With Tapo C120's dual spotlights, pierce through the darkness and low light conditions for an enhanced viewing experience at night while still being displayed in full color
  • Ultra Easy & Hassle-Free Installation - Installation and mounting are a breeze with the C120's strong and adjustable magnetic base while its 9.8 ft. power cord grants you the flexibility to place it virtually anywhere
  • Optional Invisible Infared Lights - If the red IR LEDs are a distraction to you, your children, or your pets, you may switch to invisible IR mode to continue monitoring throughout the night but without the red IR indicator
  • FREE Smart AI Detection - Smart AI technology detects and identifies people, pets, and vehicles, sending you only relevant notifications while effectively avoiding unnecessary alerts
  • Customizable Sound & Light Alarm - Record your own audio to use as an alarm and adjust the brightness of the spotlight to suit your preferences for a completely customized alarm system to deter intruders
  • Full Duplex Two-Way Audio - Listen and speak to guests, delivery drivers, and pets on the other side of the camera with enhanced clarity thanks to Tapo C120's premium microphone and speakers.
  • Secured Local & Cloud Storage - Keep up to 512 GB of footage stored continuously on a microSD card (sold separately) or choose our Tapo Care Cloud subscription service, which not only saves your 30-day video history but also provides additional benefits such as activity notifications with snapshots.
  • Compatibility with Amazon Alexa & Google Home - Take command with voice control capabilities through popular third-party devices like Amazon Alexa and Google Home, allowing you to effortlessly manage your Tapo C120 and enjoy true hands-free operation.
  • Cross-Line Detection - Manually set no-go zones through the free Tapo Care app then be immediately alerted when movement is detected within or around this restricted area.

TC60

Home Security Wi-Fi Camera

  • High Definition Video - Records every image in crystal-clear 1080p definition
  • Advanced Night Vision - Provides a visual distance of up to 30 ft
  • Motion Detection and Notifications - Notifies you when the camera detects movement
  • Sound and Light Alarm - Trigger light and sound effects to frighten away unwanted visitors
  • Two-Way Audio - Enables communication through a built-in microphone and speaker
  • Safe Storage - Locally stores up to 128 GB on a microSD card, equal to 384 hours (16 days) of footage (based on laboratory conditions)
  • Easy Setup and Management - Manage everything with Tapo app

Tapo C100

Home Security Wi-Fi Camera

  • High Definition Video - Records every image in crystal-clear 1080p definition
  • Advanced Night Vision - Provides a visual distance of up to 30 ft
  • Motion Detection and Notifications - Notifies you when the camera detects movement
  • Sound and Light Alarm - Trigger light and sound effects to frighten away unwanted visitors
  • Two-Way Audio - Enables communication through a built-in microphone and speaker
  • Safe Storage - Locally stores up to 128 GB on a microSD card, equal to 384 hours (16 days) of footage (based on laboratory conditions)
  • Easy Setup and Management - Manage everything with Tapo app

Tapo C110

Home Security Wi-Fi Camera

  • Ultra-High Definition Video - Records every image in ultra-high 3MP definition
  • Advanced Night Vision - Provides a visual distance of up to 30 ft
  • Motion Detection and Notifications - Notifies you when the camera detects movement
  • Sound and Light Alarm - Trigger light and sound effects to frighten away unwanted visitors
  • Two-Way Audio - Enables communication through a built-in microphone and speaker
  • Safe Storage - Locally stores up to 256 GB on a microSD card, equal to 512 hours (21 days) of footage (based on laboratory conditions)
  • Easy Setup and Management - Manage everything with Tapo app

aiTexts: The TP-Link Tapo C100 series offers crystal-clear 1080P HD video with advanced 850nm infrared night vision, ideal for monitoring your home day and night.
Equipped with two-way audio, it allows seamless communication with family members remotely through the intuitive Tapo App.
Compatible with Google Assistant and Alexa, it supports smart voice control and can simultaneously manage up to 32 cameras for comprehensive coverage.
Designed for easy setup without technical skills, it also features motion detection, privacy mode, sound and light alarms, and secure local storage up to 128GB.
Backed by a 3-year warranty and robust data encryption via Amazon cloud, it ensures reliable security and privacy protection for families.

title: 4G SIM 4MP Wifi IP Camera Dual Lens Security Protection Ai Human Monitor Outdoor Waterproof Night CCTV Video Surveillance Camera
detail_text: Main Features - Dual lens camera; - Dual-lens dual-sensor dual-screen, wide-angle Viewing + Long Distance Viewing to achieve clear monitoring from far and near; - Dual light source design, built-in infrared light + white light, night vision infrared and night vision full color can be set; - Pan Tilt Move: Bottom Lens: Horizontal: 350 degree; Vertical: 90 degree; - Support TF storage and cloud storage (need pay in V380 PRO app); - Two-way voice intercom, two-way video synchronous recording and playback; - Humanoid detection Smart Alert: Motion Triggered with Alarm, APP Push notifications and Alarm recording; - Auto Tracking: When ip camera detects object moving, it will auto move follow the object; -Smart Phone APP name: "V380 PRO" from Google Play or iOS APP Store.
detail_html:
Main Features

- Dual lens camera;

- Dual-lens dual-sensor dual-screen, wide-angle Viewing + Long Distance Viewing to achieve clear monitoring from far and near;

- Dual light source design, built-in infrared light + white light, night vision infrared and night vision full color can be set;

- Pan Tilt Move: Bottom Lens: Horizontal: 350 degree; Vertical: 90 degree;

- Support TF storage and cloud storage (need pay in V380 PRO app);

- Two-way voice intercom, two-way video synchronous recording and playback;

- Humanoid detection Smart Alert: Motion Triggered with Alarm, APP Push notifications and Alarm recording;

- Auto Tracking: When ip camera detects object moving, it will auto move follow the object;

-Smart Phone APP name: "V380 PRO" from Google Play or iOS APP Store.

detail_blocks.text: Main Features - Dual lens camera; - Dual-lens dual-sensor dual-screen, wide-angle Viewing + Long Distance Viewing to achieve clear monitoring from far and near; - Dual light source design, built-in infrared light + white light, night vision infrared and night vision full color can be set; - Pan Tilt Move: Bottom Lens: Horizontal: 350 degree; Vertical: 90 degree; - Support TF storage and cloud storage (need pay in V380 PRO app); - Two-way voice intercom, two-way video synchronous recording and playback; - Humanoid detection Smart Alert: Motion Triggered with Alarm, APP Push notifications and Alarm recording; - Auto Tracking: When ip camera detects object moving, it will auto move follow the object; -Smart Phone APP name: "V380 PRO" from Google Play or iOS APP Store.

page_json.description: AI Functions:Human Detection Shell Material:plastic Color Night Vision:YES Operating Temperature:-10°-60° IP Rating:IP66 App name:V380 Power Mode:Mains Electricity Rechargeable Battery:none Scene:Indoor and outdoor Movement Range(Tilt):Other Movement Range(Pan):0°-360° Digital Zoom:Other Optical Zoom:none Megapixels:4MP Power Supply:Normal Installation:Wall Mounted Color:black Audio Output:Two Way Audio Minimum Illumination(Lux):0.01Lux Viewing Angle:80° Video Compression Format:H.264,H.265 IR Distance(m):5-10 meters Power Supply(V):12V,2A Alarm Action:Local Alarm Supported Mobile Systems:Windows Mobile,Android,IOS Special Features:Waterproof / Weatherproof Sensor:CMOS Lens (mm):3.6mm,4mm Connectivity:IP/Network Wireless High Definition:1080P(Full-HD) Style:PT Camera Packing List:1x PTZ Camera, 1x User Manual, 1x 12V 2A WaterProof Power Supply（EU/US/UK/AU optional), 1x Screws Bag Main Features- Dual lens camera;- Dual-lens dual-sensor dual-screen, wide-angle Viewing + Long Distance Viewing to achieve clear monitoring from far and near;- Dual light source design, built-in infrared light + white light, night vision infrared and night vision full color can be set;- Pan Tilt Move: Bottom Lens: Horizontal: 350 degree; Vertical: 90 degree;- Support TF storage and cloud storage (need pay in V380 PRO app);- Two-way voice intercom, two-way video synchronous recording and playback;- Humanoid detection Smart Alert: Motion Triggered with Alarm, APP Push notifications and Alarm recording;- Auto Tracking: When ip camera detects object moving, it will auto move follow the object;-Smart Phone APP name: "V380 PRO" from Google Play or iOS APP Store.

title: [OFFICIAL SG 3 YEAR Warranty ] IMILAB 360 C22 3K Home CCTV IP Security Camera Wifi Night Vision Motion Tracking
detail_text: Official Sole Distributer for IMILAB Singapore OFFICIAL 3 Year Local Singapore Warranty: 1 - to - 1 Exchange Using Xiao Mi Home/Mijia app Singapore Server Local Stock in Singapore Physical Service Centre for your camera needs International English version: Connects to Singapore server Connects to Mi Home App: You can get to know the situation by phone at anytime or anywhere Live View through Mi Home App: Observe the photograph and video whenever necessary IMPORTANT Register warranty at www.imilab.com.sg/warranty Please note that the warranty is only applicable for authorized products sold by Official IMILAB Partners in Singapore. RECORDING DURATION microSD card not included 32GB MicroSD card will be able to record up to 96 hours 64GB MicroSD card will be able to record up to 144 hours C22 MODEL Main Features WIFI 6 Wi-Fi 6 Friendly Security Camera 5MP/3K Resolution Powerful AI Algorithm Colour Night Vision in Low Light Key Area Detection with 360° Auto Cruise Accurate Human Detection and Motion Tracking Smart Sound Detection Private Mode Instant Live View and Two-way Call -Specifications- Resolution: 5MP/3K Dimension: 108mm x 76mm x 76mm Weight: 239g Night Vision Distance: 10m Lens Aperture: 2.0 Storage: Supports Micro SD card up to 256gb Works on 2.4G Wifi Camera Box Contents 1 x Camera 1 x Original 2 metre cable 1 x Mounting Bracket 2 x Screws 2 x Screw Caps 1 x User Manual (English)
detail_html:
Official Sole Distributer for IMILAB Singapore

OFFICIAL 3 Year Local Singapore Warranty: 1 - to - 1 Exchange

  • Using Xiao Mi Home/Mijia app Singapore Server
  • Local Stock in Singapore
  • Physical Service Centre for your camera needs
  • International English version: Connects to Singapore server
  • Connects to Mi Home App: You can get to know the situation by phone at anytime or anywhere
  • Live View through Mi Home App: Observe the photograph and video whenever necessary

IMPORTANT

  • Register warranty at www.imilab.com.sg/warranty
  • Please note that the warranty is only applicable for authorized products sold by Official IMILAB Partners in Singapore.

RECORDING DURATION microSD card not included

  • 32GB MicroSD card will be able to record up to 96 hours
  • 64GB MicroSD card will be able to record up to 144 hours

C22 MODEL Main Features WIFI 6

  • Wi-Fi 6 Friendly Security Camera
  • 5MP/3K Resolution
  • Powerful AI Algorithm
  • Colour Night Vision in Low Light
  • Key Area Detection with 360° Auto Cruise
  • Accurate Human Detection and Motion Tracking
  • Smart Sound Detection
  • Private Mode
  • Instant Live View and Two-way Call

-Specifications-

Resolution: 5MP/3K

Dimension: 108mm x 76mm x 76mm

Weight: 239g

Night Vision Distance: 10m

Lens Aperture: 2.0

Storage: Supports Micro SD card up to 256gb

Works on 2.4G Wifi

Camera Box Contents

1 x Camera

1 x Original 2 metre cable

1 x Mounting Bracket

2 x Screws

2 x Screw Caps

1 x User Manual (English)

aiTexts: The IMILAB 360 C22 3K Home CCTV IP Security Camera delivers clear 2.1MP video for reliable indoor surveillance.
It features night vision and smart motion tracking to monitor activity effectively in low light.
Designed as a turret-style camera, it offers easy installation and comprehensive home protection.
The package includes camera, cable, plug, and manual, backed by a 3-year local warranty in Singapore.
Ideal for daily home security, it ensures peace of mind with authorized support and hassle-free use.

product.desc:
Official Sole Distributer for IMILAB Singapore

OFFICIAL 3 Year Local Singapore Warranty: 1 - to - 1 Exchange

  • Using Xiao Mi Home/Mijia app Singapore Server
  • Local Stock in Singapore
  • Physical Service Centre for your camera needs
  • International English version: Connects to Singapore server
  • Connects to Mi Home App: You can get to know the situation by phone at anytime or anywhere
  • Live View through Mi Home App: Observe the photograph and video whenever necessary

IMPORTANT

  • Register warranty at www.imilab.com.sg/warranty
  • Please note that the warranty is only applicable for authorized products sold by Official IMILAB Partners in Singapore.

RECORDING DURATION microSD card not included

  • 32GB MicroSD card will be able to record up to 96 hours
  • 64GB MicroSD card will be able to record up to 144 hours

C22 MODEL Main Features WIFI 6

  • Wi-Fi 6 Friendly Security Camera
  • 5MP/3K Resolution
  • Powerful AI Algorithm
  • Colour Night Vision in Low Light
  • Key Area Detection with 360° Auto Cruise
  • Accurate Human Detection and Motion Tracking
  • Smart Sound Detection
  • Private Mode
  • Instant Live View and Two-way Call

-Specifications-

Resolution: 5MP/3K

Dimension: 108mm x 76mm x 76mm

Weight: 239g

Night Vision Distance: 10m

Lens Aperture: 2.0

Storage: Supports Micro SD card up to 256gb

Works on 2.4G Wifi

Camera Box Contents

1 x Camera

1 x Original 2 metre cable

1 x Mounting Bracket

2 x Screws

2 x Screw Caps

1 x User Manual (English)

detail_html:
Fast Delivery: The package will be Shipped within 24 hours.

The package from China will arrive in about 8-15 days. The package from Overseas warehouse will arrive in about 5-12 days.


We will not put any invoices, QR codes, promotions or brand name logo in the package.

Specification：

HD: 1080P HD
Lens (mm): 3.6mm
Sensor: CMOS
Video compression format: H.264
Connectivity: IP/Network Wireless.
Viewing angle: 355° (horizontal) / 90° (vertical)
Network protocol: Wi-Fi/802.11/b/g
Night Mode: Full Color Infrared Night Vision
Supported mobile system: Android/ios
Power supply: E27 110-240V
Power: <5W
Size: 150*65mm.
Waterproof rating: IP 66 (not suitable for direct submersion into water)

Feature:

1. Support 5G/2.4G WIFI connection.
2. Support automatic tracking and alarm sound function.
3. Support two-way voice calls and real-time calls.
4. Support panning 355 degrees/tilting 90 degrees.
5. Support TF card up to 128GB memory card.
6. Support humanoid intelligent alarm dual lights.
7. Support preset position/prompt voice and alarm bell/cruise function.
8. Remote viewing through YIIOT smart phone.
9.4x Graven Ital zoom.
10. Support TF card storage (8G-128G memory card can be selected) + cloud storage.
11. 10-15M (IR LED) day and night vision.

Package Includes:

Camera * 1
E27 base * 1
Screw pack * 1
Manual*1

About Shipment

1. If you choose to ship from China, we ship by the AliExpress Standard Shipping; if you choose to ship from overseas warehouses, we will ship by the local logistics delivery.
2. Your order is generally shipped within 24h, please kindly be more patient to wait.
3. Anything please feel free to let me know,we will solve it for you as soon as possible.

About Service

1. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us. And we will reply in 24 hours except weekends.
2. If any problems comes to you, please don't worry. You can contact us first. We promise we will try everything possible to help you.
3. Please pay attention to the time difference between us. We work in China.

About Feedback

Your confirmation will be highly appreciated after receiving the items. Once you have received the product, hope you could leave us a positive feedback(4 or 5 stars). -BEFORE you leaving the negative feedback. PLEASE contact us at first, and we can help you solve the problem.

We strive to do better and make you feel satisfied!

product.desc:
Fast Delivery: The package will be Shipped within 24 hours.

The package from China will arrive in about 8-15 days. The package from Overseas warehouse will arrive in about 5-12 days.


We will not put any invoices, QR codes, promotions or brand name logo in the package.

Specification：

HD: 1080P HD
Lens (mm): 3.6mm
Sensor: CMOS
Video compression format: H.264
Connectivity: IP/Network Wireless.
Viewing angle: 355° (horizontal) / 90° (vertical)
Network protocol: Wi-Fi/802.11/b/g
Night Mode: Full Color Infrared Night Vision
Supported mobile system: Android/ios
Power supply: E27 110-240V
Power: <5W
Size: 150*65mm.
Waterproof rating: IP 66 (not suitable for direct submersion into water)

Feature:

1. Support 5G/2.4G WIFI connection.
2. Support automatic tracking and alarm sound function.
3. Support two-way voice calls and real-time calls.
4. Support panning 355 degrees/tilting 90 degrees.
5. Support TF card up to 128GB memory card.
6. Support humanoid intelligent alarm dual lights.
7. Support preset position/prompt voice and alarm bell/cruise function.
8. Remote viewing through YIIOT smart phone.
9.4x Graven Ital zoom.
10. Support TF card storage (8G-128G memory card can be selected) + cloud storage.
11. 10-15M (IR LED) day and night vision.

Package Includes:

Camera * 1
E27 base * 1
Screw pack * 1
Manual*1

About Shipment

1. If you choose to ship from China, we ship by the AliExpress Standard Shipping; if you choose to ship from overseas warehouses, we will ship by the local logistics delivery.
2. Your order is generally shipped within 24h, please kindly be more patient to wait.
3. Anything please feel free to let me know,we will solve it for you as soon as possible.

About Service

1. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us. And we will reply in 24 hours except weekends.
2. If any problems comes to you, please don't worry. You can contact us first. We promise we will try everything possible to help you.
3. Please pay attention to the time difference between us. We work in China.

About Feedback

Your confirmation will be highly appreciated after receiving the items. Once you have received the product, hope you could leave us a positive feedback(4 or 5 stars). -BEFORE you leaving the negative feedback. PLEASE contact us at first, and we can help you solve the problem.

We strive to do better and make you feel satisfied!

page_json.name: EZVIZ H6c Pro 2MP 1080P | 3MP 2K G1 WiFi 6 with Video Intercom Call Button Smart Wifi Pan & Tilt PTZ Wireless IP Camera (App:EZVIZ by Hikvision)
page_json.description: The EZVIZ H6C Pro security camera offers versatile surveillance with 2MP to 5MP resolution options. This dual-band WiFi smart camera supports pan/tilt motion and video intercom, ideal for indoor use with its bullet design and wide compatibility. - Lazada
